subject: Next

body:
Thank you for believing in me and my campaign.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648902a0/7f51f7bc/4da0ff94/4ef1821b/426904424/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Thank you, Peter, for believing in me and my campaign.

It hasn't even been 24 hours since we qualified for the runoff and we're already showing how powerful we are as a team. **[Will you make a matched donation to be one of our first runoff donors and help us start this new phase off strong by hitting our $75,000 goal?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648902a0/7f51f7bc/4da0ff94/4ef1821a/426904424/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwMTUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-postprimary?refcode=email_20200304.3nd__1015__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

I know with your help we're going to hit this goal out of the ballpark, show everyone (including Sen. Cornyn) how powerful this team is, and then take it home. **[All donations right now are being matched, so your donation today will get us twice as far!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648902a0/7f51f7bc/4da0ff94/4ef1821a/426904424/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwMTUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-postprimary?refcode=email_20200304.3nd__1015__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

We are so excited for the next couple of months, because even though this runoff will be hard-fought, it gives us another chance to reach even more voters and get them pumped up to send a fighter in the Senate. Hitting today's **$75,000 goal** will be key to start us off in a powerful position.

But today starts a new phase of this campaign, and I'm going to need your help. **[Your matched donation today goes a long way towards boosting our momentum through this next phase, so please pitch in before midnight.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648902a0/7f51f7bc/4da0ff94/4ef1821a/426904424/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwMTUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-postprimary?refcode=email_20200304.3nd__1015__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

Let's hit these goals, win the runoff, and then take the fight straight to Sen. Cornyn!

\-- MJ

********[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648902a0/7f51f7bc/4da0ff94/4ef1821a/426904424/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwMTUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-postprimary?refcode=email_20200304.3nd__1015__&amount=10&recurring=true")********

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: One Indiana: Best College Experiences
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Indiana has a lot of great colleges and universities and the students who study in our state are extremely creative and full of school pride. [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=f8445a51916f4457bd79227ffc6768e4&_e=zjj_oeoLU1rJTvU8-7HSOwyaumsqIXJcs52aj_jXJyvDnYvXYrgOVGjKSYsC4zWtNm6Uok_FDMrvNCCEcZr9cKvVp12rLopoDYj6iplJXAPJ097fbHI5gIR8rAQl_lT6P9fciI_Ri-pQC1NmKTasow8DD3cxmhSljlc8tkAPYYpzr4j5gkkvKm_FF4olXGyGdNX0o8V0JGKes62fpzAEFRAtxETFvtLqdsUZ3JDUL6nOfiR68Ov6U_0G0-x-ed2tJGuq7e4pG4XXuNAeTg0laDQ_Gk4wkt10r-b9qMsRhS8tydf2utkHIl-yTTPXXNDoOohaHdc1pfLLvlVPxs19w76dI87QP4eKZcWJ7slkECxcPFCyMT8l16MrqpL7vjvmCmZKNEZl1R0miRDir3UUG94wDZsV_6qTzU9X3Jdw0h8%3D) Friend,

Indiana has an unrivaled network of great colleges and universities all over our state, and the Hoosiers, Boilermakers, Fighting Irish, Cardinals, Panthers, and on and on who study here are extremely creative when it comes to showing their school pride.
And let’s just say that creativity has led to some pretty great college experiences. Eric couldn’t possibly fit all of those traditions at Indiana schools on his list, but he picked a few of his favorites below.
Check it out! [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=f8445a51916f4457bd79227ffc6768e4&_e=zjj_oeoLU1rJTvU8-7HSOwyaumsqIXJcs52aj_jXJyvDnYvXYrgOVGjKSYsC4zWtNm6Uok_FDMrvNCCEcZr9cKvVp12rLopoDYj6iplJXAPJ097fbHI5gIR8rAQl_lT6P9fciI_Ri-pQC1NmKTasow8DD3cxmhSljlc8tkAPYYpzr4j5gkkvKm_FF4olXGyGdNX0o8V0JGKes62fpzAEFSulaKYwTEoHtEU1RmtiabMWTHUXfaNfnWi_d-OLpiM5Pv5Rj8TuOUro6hL29BMvvznDjysU7huXztz_dTPBTavoGf6HkB22cHFIzO95Gd_3XxQ6JDtnrmiECyPQIKiDGgZB5h08FXrgpHLonE6yKgc9Rm3RUFk5V8Omxcl06ruelMydFGvuthYMdPjWNis-ewHyM70i_H9-53C8iPinbsI%3D)
* **Little 500 -** At Indiana University, “The World’s Greatest College Weekend” consists of the largest collegiate bike race in America. Literally the stuff they make movies out of! **[Check out all the details here.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=f8445a51916f4457bd79227ffc6768e4&_e=zjj_oeoLU1rJTvU8-7HSO9YQw07VWBmItzUi8IANCE3jgDZYnRm1qaOmNQQ4S-eENB0rzCHrnmm8ZHLFN6sXggsaSQJGxb5XiuXuCRRg8YusVJI3LH1MLSDB0moQsUeNNFedu_8nnIRPpRDdTyGD6jbmN2htt2bbMJNuAgpgq3j4KUy4OnYYuysQdLlX2_NZ69DxJxxYSNRm5ihRqaYn3nVSiS75SOKqFFT6Ggq5ahYIcpSxwW6sqDjCrx_r-TsbMfRqqVdApWHHT_u1dN-V3pIwpIxbShe_LCQu3QjIklSyIJ25ngTIk1SYlPnCc8VMvCT22atMLDQ0bh8Lh_jTEa0lSXfIGNUzhr7DMBtdk3pVwPV--E8v3oTWr710Rc1ScpKm0aMixfa2-eunU9KGtg%3D%3D)**
* **Silent Night -** This is truly a special and (wild) night for Taylor University **[(if you’re curious about this one, all you have to do is watch this video)](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=f8445a51916f4457bd79227ffc6768e4&_e=zjj_oeoLU1rJTvU8-7HSO0-RwmaHANqFNo4BIZvLTdnGiI6dIiBkQ7lvfJ8mrWS12zLRkVQowY_1cYFBE_aZdcr84cu9lxGRGWjp7UvTkhV3CpkAB47N5VgbtYHCgl4GCtvDiL07KCJMeWwxK21VcK8cG7Sq7RJtY8LeER6CG6w1GBuYbQ0bHnBiLqvTjHJvBUeScfVIPDWXAE1XUqrUjM7FO-tRPdsc5fUrPNB-pmkwZyQURbzoag9LlIanUy7mz7lCvvxG8ArkFt_7X6DuTOZXzH_FTHk6MvJN7ZTwRv3b7pVGQTwgZWVFstq3fWQQzTxVZ0fogjW9Zh7l7i7H_tEzSkjz2ISo3Yk4Qwb7CmB7FmS3PSpbudY7OsS521WuuG8c7yP__A_1Gb3ISWImpfmsc9_wV33DoUgG-QfhjNLPdJsnBrplYFJJaA5R3kFZ)**.
* **Purdue Grand Prix** \- This annual go-kart race has been held at Purdue University since 1958 — **[check out the details here.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=f8445a51916f4457bd79227ffc6768e4&_e=zjj_oeoLU1rJTvU8-7HSO2Ey2mbg2wdCuxNZ0FFJL9MQG5UP-vLMAD5sqTy4A1yLvddnNZ7xzXH7XPrhavwnebN3oldULw6X1YiQEsuTqKv09jaMO1uCuYJRxGsBcVAZ1zLH0YEnISb7TTQJgrWN-gXCrsnpJw6lxUS2AtVszllbel_Hq3OMZ113V3VrADD0pobGtTgI-maN9e8uugIvX-iC2jr-IRGfTdXKyzlKnuGBtBgleh-Eikw0RFWUyro6ZU8CvEmuuC7PosYp-TviJ35ggz6PxXKDK7D0PKE0Z76FUa5vr9sx5KCxHZNWeg3z0LjhoCSrJfWUeyKdDwQ_MoRc7FUWYQrI8hDET2YN5_0oaMl5uFu4_e4QbLIibGQjuJQAsTgVRN3x72FdIBQRVX4ERWtjQgSg3A-vwVU_WzpITsJKol8nGjN8xdzNbg1D)**
* **[Monon Bell Game](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=f8445a51916f4457bd79227ffc6768e4&_e=zjj_oeoLU1rJTvU8-7HSO9_e_dG70gh7FYBdz0PPAnpYNT6llc05WlDPaYaFit6oIJso0A-9KJ1SnDhfr3iujSHx0bimNK2xff_Uh-ShOwPnAI95H6-xYU0FUUD3TJVrC-JzK6ZABqSegdpvy2K6ZJiI7MefTPgd8h5-afhSPId4xtSDUUsq8DvLyaIS8_SRZGsrDK3opZoF3n0NT5ZZz7S_oK4pJgymm0HaHUlk_hUBjl5txIRa3UcaBi3aLMwOG7TkSGghd9oiDyMQI8KsQyO1DWvINBIFF8hIy1ynHMtAOcY6BAdcW2JVWDSMl1S4LEMnACetz8Y9HPbiu7lJctvDe51L6bQ-rMpIn4GWmLK3jRUGPSjwh_vlgKZhvKB9Kzg-nETDoMF99TJFJaHa6JxmrweURGnRRHjEER1UZLI%3D)** \- Wabash and Depauw have played each other 126 times (it’s as intense as rivalries get). Since 1932, the trophy awarded to the victor has been a 300-pound locomotive bell.
* **“Play Like a Champion Today”** \- Football players at the University of Notre Dame touch this iconic sign before every single game. Taking a tour of Notre Dame Stadium is something every Hoosier should experience. **[Check out a video of this tradition’s history.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=f8445a51916f4457bd79227ffc6768e4&_e=zjj_oeoLU1rJTvU8-7HSO10t3kREKgqfdiCgOy3wkRJ1w98U4NUWaar-oNpo9fKdWbXtVpQPBRWvNZOpT0w6cFtbJPkkDFNGEwXDyUQ5iKtJ93r2ymsfcHzpGBDCWjq7zTZqiXvkbCpqHerdF3aXtMvdAYpEJZbjBuvzxy8eZSmTCjf8BXtYRVFbEQ8c5eC4Ptgbe33ITSITc_gGfKgYw8Eiyafur-C8kitOk_hVvHPgwUqDS9xKPG1daABmj_tgGoTai2lQE2SQKnACUn-f68CAyIiozl234L2IGf0ORRMg419lcgfXnOmfpJQ-YwkoEkvgL0ACrXDN9eBYGXOKDJZ6qtJhhF3RL_JPn2VlpCfayjh03Bs-hkTkwLYm4EK-ytT2dEgfSHs7mHu8JlB0BmG2Z2QQI4yRWDRFJj2eb_duiFeUuFJ3Yi5FHyWR_FUs5xbF2MQE8mmlRwxJkPZ45A%3D%3D)**
* **Meeting Butler Blue** \- Butler University’s mascot is everyone’s favorite Hoosier pooch (besides Henry Holcomb!). Indiana’s two most famous dogs actually got a chance to meet earlier this year, **see the photos below.**

* **[Homecoming Parade](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=f8445a51916f4457bd79227ffc6768e4&_e=zjj_oeoLU1rJTvU8-7HSOycn0VxEcVo5Pj8dBO43WMT4PZKoWswR4d6fpuSjK1b0VIj_6H1wFWz-tLxPPvzbyovYqFExN7aktVAHGvnTQIgpL24H15ePmqlMekX-dlGzncGTUxe0_cWO8kFaXxL6pvfCC2V8jKqM4xbM9B0WdYZcIPnXt0INp1jspTNvLLAVmuAG9fWDEtsDVnsjKszJO0oNJbSbKm_3qXUC93LJxaj7m3eq9lHF48xR5ECuZLQpwYIDEOSW45y2BzLE-oFlSx7ihPNpL5Hou9Q1urIWzXMtU63oMdQxzm_B5TpihLrdN40X6vRmpLEhNlGu89-TgWrMBT6bDspOIuYwjrw3sBQkZ7pkDN_f8ZdOBIQ-zr_wZ5mHn57sAWJi2H9geNyfxsl0jhAMa-q1GI30ykiIzoA%3D) **\- You can’t miss out on Indiana State University’s Blue and White Homecoming parade. The longest student-run parade in the country.
* **Study Abroad** \- several Indiana schools offer study abroad programs, but **[Valparaiso University](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=f8445a51916f4457bd79227ffc6768e4&_e=zjj_oeoLU1rJTvU8-7HSO0yE8E7VIwS2gV11UNNI4pIrUF7jK2pp4aWffQ5FiLiU1MOt9dq-Ya5AWux1PV-dwKhVu8L1Bgij_c91XasyRf_5_dax3awvoXu1rdbteisiq9LAI0XafYI8V5_qPpuibVEsyelAwZZ1ZjRuNXRUcXmLmaQGlLz1xR9lKdwHMBK9IZ2kATVIWyBv8Kh1VQL5nzDUrwtCK99Ajsxi2_1Obm1RkocyxqXHQT-ugIKbHr3VWoTE5veUblxsGvbWpmf6J1LabzoVzz_AjqAx4NCdJ7HhptI5uErKO_oGyCaRcc9E27_44PnChvAvMub1zMviJWP4AxFaqkqnt1bFYdvXDJC1XqKMggWabt6U-yt5Lsj2nSItryc7YBHKD-rcmhxTTg%3D%3D)** takes it to the Next Level! Valpo is one of the top 40 study abroad schools in the country and is a top producer of Fulbright Scholars in the nation.
* **Swimming Across the Ohio River** \- OK, maybe not an official tradition, but this is something Eric did as a student at Hanover College.
* **[Regatta on the Indianapolis canal](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=f8445a51916f4457bd79227ffc6768e4&_e=zjj_oeoLU1rJTvU8-7HSO2RCt1QBgiYuqME36lNo9zlVxJ4wIz7yKc0ccrFHNMbz_k2o34qgLyxPonN7M3BSA2aU-ry__h627-oKvx8XX0LJFIgMsc0jL5467xSJuhW1bBvsCWnqLd63GOYyclV06W3GF7SPp3eq5RtgQ7BX-hkocKRMWtG1YGlYT-sWcSB1UWXbb9FJ_dJkR1fscMKkbTTNsq-AVZfBH0iKSNK6UooPGpB1XR2cHjR3OZSNdx2gbvnbDCFlE3QHUlSpjc8gfLVti0yQnyrIyThKnJYBNvlF9_81weZNHkmkG9vK8L9QyGKQQlKAmVRZgwG5NCIWD3FjA7MfxEkRKxDvqLHB7eun9TcjaNcLgZpCuvLy1R8O)** \- IUPUI holds this canoe race annually, and the proceeds go toward the Stefan S. Davis IUPUI Regatta Scholarship.
* **Bed Races** \- This homecoming event at Ball State University consists of teams **[pushing a bed](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=f8445a51916f4457bd79227ffc6768e4&_e=zjj_oeoLU1rJTvU8-7HSO_tNqxXCsKBLjw6lTsOQKMHpszQG2I2iAz2EQNZ336r7iQptvst8IXPSQlVVrRyT8bZmYfrPJDSURbwnjWBdpRoXC_WIdWYn70Cv1dZLszQm7EUFIfM4qwhX1qAEAuLGVAMKTW-OHYtplN6PbU2Rn2cgOA496fu47F_ApL72cZC6AH3FFOyiH2lmx-c_32ADdrKQ7pK2MXrV2k_tevusBwXxcGBXKd6soF-Q4a5CE88xQeixQCusJv64LS5e36TDCZj894U0vSx-MRFEAwSIsDt_ru1ofSWNbQvkX0c38hoqFOB1M1I9Q1D8CVfyYw6OvGhQUysrt2Rz7_Ozqy2FTLw4y-xGQ_uI6iVjV5m4WVbKme1pbjjgbnumP_OrAIWL_hhtvYdyIUuHScGpF02n7mwsu98l9vnKNDAyR_58zOuTL681iCjJ44RH4xwciPaIoQ%3D%3D)** down the road on campus...enough said.

**Flash Survey** **Q: What's your favorite college experience in Indiana?** [ **Let us know!** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=f8445a51916f4457bd79227ffc6768e4&_e=zjj_oeoLU1rJTvU8-7HSOwyaumsqIXJcs52aj_jXJyvDnYvXYrgOVGjKSYsC4zWtNm6Uok_FDMrvNCCEcZr9cKvVp12rLopoDYj6iplJXAPJ097fbHI5gIR8rAQl_lT6P9fciI_Ri-pQC1NmKTasow8DD3cxmhSljlc8tkAPYYpzr4j5gkkvKm_FF4olXGyGdNX0o8V0JGKes62fpzAEFQh1tAn0F5nH3wPIEk37A90XNHY3gXnXK568a4CfHMH5Vz-irZXb_RDWgVgR9eJEeK4VmFLLS5noHny1zfBjvuLVrtL2Qk72DPEObQDZE7xQxghmZowQSsXTMxYXqvLfr-RghIL3NbST7iaCUZ6WBd7IeZtgNFsMR4ualPINMwchte6CNEs_JvfsO1k-UidClhq-3EFIQauPBODEp_qJPH0%3D) **That’s our list for this week!** We hope that you get a chance to experience any of these amazing traditions in the next year! Thanks,
-Holcomb Crew |

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Coffee?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
Hi, there --

This week, I'll be sitting down with my team to go over our priorities and strategy for the next couple months. Before we do, it's important to me that I get your feedback.

While my opponent is busy being Donald Trump's favorite yes-man, my top priority is making sure this campaign is about you and fighting for your interests in Washington.

I wish I could sit down and grab coffee (or a cold beer) with each and every one of you to hear about your concerns. But the next-best way for me to know what's on your mind is through my quick priorities survey.

Will you take a few minutes (two, tops!) to let me know what issues matter most to you in this race?

TAKE SURVEY: https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/march-issues-survey

Now more than ever, we must come together to build a winning movement to give Colorado a leader they can trust to do what's right. But the only way we'll win is if we set our priorities and follow through on them together.

Your feedback is extremely important to me, so I really hope you'll take some time to fill out my survey today.

Thanks. I'll be in touch soon.

-- John-------

Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado

P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218

Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper for Colorado are not tax deductible.

If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper for Colorado team by signing up right here: https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up

We love staying connected to you—and these emails are the best way to stay up to date with the latest on this campaign. But if at any point you’d like to stop receiving these messages, you can unsubscribe here: https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe. If you'd like to receive only the most important campaign updates, click here: https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/id-like-to-get-less-email.

If we’re not reaching you at the correct email address, please update your information here: https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up

At a Monday rally with Sunrise Eugene, Students for Bernie, Lane County for Bernie Sanders, and the Graduate Teaching Fellows Federation, Doyle announced her formal endorsement of Senator Bernie Sanders for President, embracing the #NotMeUs movement and pledging to deliver SW Oregon for Bernie. Join our canvases this weekend and get involved. Oregon's delegate count is now in play, and we play to win.
---
|
---
Dear supporters, Super Tuesday was tough for me, as I watched my sister in the movement, Jessica Cisneros, come within 3 points of victory over Trump's favorite Democrat in Congress, Henry Cuellar. Cuellar had the endorsement and backing from the Kochs, the fossil fuel industry, the private prison industry - and the Speaker of the House, who campaigned for him saying that she wanted him to win "decisively" over our champion, Jessica. While that decisive victory margin was denied, the loss is heartbreaking - and the Establishment is gloating. But like AOC said in the Knock Down the House Documentary, "For one of us to make it through, a hundred of us have to try." While they keep gloating, we keep going - door by door, voter by voter, all across the district. On Monday, I announced my endorsement of Senator Sanders for President at a rally on the UO campus. In the coming months, Oregon will become a battleground in a way that has new significance after last night's result. Let me be clear: we will leave absolutely everything on the field for Sanders in SW Oregon. We will win this race, and we will win this district for Sanders. You can count on me to be in the fight with Bernie all the way to Milwaukee, and all the way to Whitehouse. Onward, Doyle
---

He is accepting no funds from the fossil fuel industry, or any corporate PACs, Super PACs, or industry lobbyists. I'm with Bernie to take on corruption and corporate power in our politics, and to fight for fundamental change." -Doyle Canning | UPCOMING EVENTS PHONE BANKING AT UO This Thursday at 5pm, there will be a student-led phone bank at the EMU. As always, free pizza will be provided! SATURDAY CANVASSING EUGENE There will be a group leaving from the campaign HQ at 10am to hit the doors around Eugene and spread the word about Doyle! SATURDAY CANVASS IN CORVALLIS Join our growing network of supporters by canvassing weekly in Corvallis! Bring your walking shoes and your friends! SUNDAY CANVASS IN EUGENE (HQ) Join volunteers as again on Sunday as we depart from HQ in Eugene and go door to door speaking with our neighbors about Doyle! | YES WE CAN... | ENDORSEMENT ALERT! We also received an endorsement this week from Kelsey Juliana and Vic Baret, who have been leading the fight for a livable planet in the groundbreaking lawsuit, Juliana V. United States. | COALITION OF GRADUATE EMPLOYEES Even though she is a Duck, Doyle stands with graduate employees at Oregon State University in their fight for fair wages and to #ChopfromtheTop of administrative salaries to fund needed changes on campus. #GoBeavs | Doyle Canning is running for Congress in Oregon's 4th Congressional District. Doyle is rejecting all corporate PAC money in this campaign. She relies on grassroots supporters like you! "Donate to Doyle Canning" | | | Sent Via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Canning For Congress 2020, please .

subject: On to the runoff
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathaleen Wall for Congress
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/484470807ec7/on-to-the-runoff?e=01c99b7fbd)
---
| |
---
| | Hi friend,

Last night was an absolute joy.

So many of you joined me and my husband Holly in Sugar Land for an unforgettable evening of excitedly watching the election results come in from across Fort Bend, Brazoria, and Harris Counties. ([**Check out photos here if you missed the party!**](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=46d176f1ba&e=01c99b7fbd))

---
| [ ](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=426ae9fc5a&e=01c99b7fbd)
---
| [ ](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=3431fee55c&e=01c99b7fbd)
---
| [ ](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=445bc4c814&e=01c99b7fbd)
---
|
**We are headed to a runoff!**

**THANK YOU** for standing with me so I’m able to go to Washington D.C. to stand with President Trump. I’m more excited than ever to work on our much-needed reform for immigration, taxes, and regulations.

Nancy Pelosi has dubbed Congressional District 22 as a “toss up seat” that the Democrat machine thinks is winnable.

Unbelievable!

**Texans, and especially you and the rest of our friends and family in CD-22, would never allow our district to turn socialist.**

The CD-22 Democrat nominee, Sri Preston Kulkarni raised millions in 2018 from across the country to flip CD-22 blue, and came within 4.9% of the final vote to win the seat from recently retired CD-22 Congressman Pete Olson. Kulkarni is working hard to do the same again in 2020

You and I will NOT stand for this.

**The runoff election is May 26 and we cannot rest on our laurels now.**

President Trump needs a Republican representing CD-22 and I’m the one for the job.

I knocked on thousands upon thousands of doors leading up to the Primary Election last night, and you better believe I’m not stopping now. I will continue to work tirelessly to get the vote out but**I NEED YOU to help me do that!**

[**Will you volunteer with my congressional campaign?**](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=cdf8212715&e=01c99b7fbd) Your gift of time making phone calls, block walking, or delivering yard signs will be an integral part of ensuring we win the runoff on May 26.

[Becoming a volunteer is as easy as clicking this link and taking two minutes to sign up.](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=fd11c6dbcb&e=01c99b7fbd)

Let’s buckle up for a couple months of hard work together so we can #KeepAmericaGreat!

For America and for Texas,
Kathaleen Wall
---
|
---

| | Hey Peter, wanted to make sure you saw this note from MJ. She's been **blown away** by all of the support pouring in since we finished first in the Texas primary.

As MJ wrote, we've got serious momentum right now, and your matched donation will put us a long way toward hitting our **$75,000** goal. Preston Elliott

Cornyn) how powerful this team is, and then take it home. **[All donations right now are being matched, so your donation today will get us twice as far!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648902a2/7f51f7bc/4da5550f/4ef1829c/1340677656/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwMTcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-postprimary?refcode=email_20200304.4nd__1017__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

name: Steve Chabot
subject: My Take on Super Tuesday
body:
Joe gets his mojo back No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jhijiho-kujkulhluu-v/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhijiho-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhijiho-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [My Take on Super Tuesday](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhijiho-kujkulhluu-j/)
Yesterday was Super Tuesday. 14 states across the country held their primaries, and one territory, American Samoa. The results were pretty interesting. Joe Biden, who looked like his campaign was on life-support, won BIG. And the press dutifully changed their tone. Joe is now the comeback kid! [Read more >](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhijiho-kujkulhluu-t/) [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhijiho-kujkulhluu-i/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhijiho-kujkulhluu-d/)
### [Bernie and Fidel](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhijiho-kujkulhluu-h/)
In the course of his political career, the presumptive Democratic nominee for the presidency, Bernie Sanders has had many wacky points of view. In this week's blog, I'll focus on one - Bernie's admiration of the communist dictator, Fidel Castro. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhijiho-kujkulhluu-k/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhijiho-kujkulhluu-u/)
### [A Bloomberg - Hillary Ticket?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhijiho-kujkulhluu-o/)
I first heard the story over the weekend that Mike Bloomberg might be considering Hillary Clinton as a vice presidential running mate. Like me, maybe this caught you by surprise? In this week's blog I write about how likely we could see a Bloomberg - Hillary Democrat ticket. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhijiho-kujkulhluu-b/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhijiho-kujkulhluu-n/)
### [Fentanyl is a Killer](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhijiho-kujkulhluu-p/)
The good news is drug overdose deaths in the United States are down over the last year. The bad news is that there are still far too many. In this week's blog, I discuss what Congress is doing to help fight the opioid epidemic, specifically targeting fentanyl. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhijiho-kujkulhluu-x/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhijiho-kujkulhluu-m/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhijiho-kujkulhluu-c/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhijiho-kujkulhluu-q/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhijiho-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhijiho-kujkulhluu-f/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhijiho-kujkulhluu-z/)
---|---|---
Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254

| **NH Voices -- Matt Mayberry: Finish the border wall, punish sanctuary cities**
By Matt Mayberry OUR immigration system is broken, plain and simple. I know this is something that everyone, regardless of political party or ideology, can agree on. Every year, hundreds of thousands of illegal immigrants unlawfully cross over our southern border. However there are those who chose to try to immigrate the right way, through the legal application process, and wait their turn, often for years. We need to fix this problem. For conservatives such as myself, the answer is simple: cut off the flow of illegal immigrants by completing President Trump’s border wall. I would even suggest the idea of digging the walls deeper to prevent tunnels from being created and using sensors and drone technology to patrol the open desert spaces that span hundreds of miles. We also need to revamp our current system to efficiently process legal immigration applications, including H-1B and H-2B visas for our agricultural and tech industries. We must expedite the judicial process for expelling those here illegally. Socialist-leaning liberals favor a combination of outright amnesty and expanded asylum. I strongly disagree with them. Rewarding illegal activity is wrong and only encourages more illegal activity. These same liberals also support sanctuary cities, which I believe is not only wrong and untenable, it flies in the face of everything we value as a nation of laws. Sanctuary cities, the brainchild of liberals elites in large coastal cities like San Francisco and New York, have become far too prevalent over the past few years. These cities have chosen to allow all illegal immigrants, regardless of prior criminal history, to live free from the reach of federal Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) and even local police. Fourteen states, including Vermont, even provide drivers’ licenses based solely on the idea of “Well, they are already driving.” NO. They are here illegally and should be punished. The results for cities and states that have permitted this status have been a disaster, with rising crime, rampant drug use and a general disregard for the rule of law. Look at San Francisco, where drug use and homelessness have become huge problems despite the area being one of the country’s wealthiest. Beyond the increased crime and flow of drugs from Central and South America, sanctuary cities have created an even more dangerous and fundamental challenge to the very existence of our system of government. The United States is a nation of laws. We do not simply pick and choose which laws we want to enforce. Sanctuary cities are not providing sanctuary, they are providing a get-out-of-jail-free card for people who knowingly break federal law. Today, there are more than 560 self-declared sanctuary cities in our country, including Boston and Lawrence, Mass., and the numbers are increasing each year. Sanctuary cities should be dealt with quickly and decisively before they become too commonplace to eradicate. My proposed solution: If a municipality chooses to become a sanctuary city, we should immediately cut off all federal funding to it. It should be that simple. If you chose to ignore federal law, you should not receive one penny from the federal government. I strongly believe in states’ rights and I believe in a less-centralized government because the best decisions are made at a local level, but immigration must be kept solely as a federal issue. Because of our constitutionally-protected right to move freely between states, we cannot have states and municipalities creating their own immigration policies. Yet, that is essentially what the proliferation of sanctuary cities has done. It is an unworkable system and we must unite as a country to put a halt to this unlawful and dangerous behavior.

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | Derek Did you get a chance to read my most recent Op-Ed that ran in both the Union Leader and the Granite Grok? Take a look at it below and if you agree that we need to finish the wall on our Southern Border and stop sanctuary cities, . Thank you! - Matt | | | | | | | | | | | | NH Voices -- Matt Mayberry: Finish the border wall, punish sanctuary cities By Matt Mayberry OUR immigration system is broken, plain and simple. I know this is something that everyone, regardless of political party or ideology, can agree on. Every year, hundreds of thousands of illegal immigrants unlawfully cross over our southern border. However there are those who chose to try to immigrate the right way, through the legal application process, and wait their turn, often for years. We need to fix this problem. For conservatives such as myself, the answer is simple: cut off the flow of illegal immigrants by completing President Trump’s border wall. I would even suggest the idea of digging the walls deeper to prevent tunnels from being created and using sensors and drone technology to patrol the open desert spaces that span hundreds of miles. We also need to revamp our current system to efficiently process legal immigration applications, including H-1B and H-2B visas for our agricultural and tech industries. We must expedite the judicial process for expelling those here illegally. Socialist-leaning liberals favor a combination of outright amnesty and expanded asylum. I strongly disagree with them. Rewarding illegal activity is wrong and only encourages more illegal activity. These same liberals also support sanctuary cities, which I believe is not only wrong and untenable, it flies in the face of everything we value as a nation of laws. Sanctuary cities, the brainchild of liberals elites in large coastal cities like San Francisco and New York, have become far too prevalent over the past few years. These cities have chosen to allow all illegal immigrants, regardless of prior criminal history, to live free from the reach of federal Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) and even local police. Fourteen states, including Vermont, even provide drivers’ licenses based solely on the idea of “Well, they are already driving.” NO. They are here illegally and should be punished. The results for cities and states that have permitted this status have been a disaster, with rising crime, rampant drug use and a general disregard for the rule of law. Look at San Francisco, where drug use and homelessness have become huge problems despite the area being one of the country’s wealthiest. Beyond the increased crime and flow of drugs from Central and South America, sanctuary cities have created an even more dangerous and fundamental challenge to the very existence of our system of government. The United States is a nation of laws. We do not simply pick and choose which laws we want to enforce. Sanctuary cities are not providing sanctuary, they are providing a get-out-of-jail-free card for people who knowingly break federal law. Today, there are more than 560 self-declared sanctuary cities in our country, including Boston and Lawrence, Mass., and the numbers are increasing each year. Sanctuary cities should be dealt with quickly and decisively before they become too commonplace to eradicate. My proposed solution: If a municipality chooses to become a sanctuary city, we should immediately cut off all federal funding to it. It should be that simple. If you chose to ignore federal law, you should not receive one penny from the federal government. I strongly believe in states’ rights and I believe in a less-centralized government because the best decisions are made at a local level, but immigration must be kept solely as a federal issue. Because of our constitutionally-protected right to move freely between states, we cannot have states and municipalities creating their own immigration policies. Yet, that is essentially what the proliferation of sanctuary cities has done. It is an unworkable system and we must unite as a country to put a halt to this unlawful and dangerous behavior. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid For By Matt Mayberry for Congress | | | Matt Mayberry for Congress | | P.O. Box 1776, Dover NH 03821 United States | | | ---|---|---

name: Adem Bunkeddeko
subject: I’d choose our people-power over their deep pockets any day
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/OestCTSbF-zy2xG3ohZ74qI2B3XYd648moZ4BwvxO4k=/f_o5F95ixCwaX-H6d7xro9xi5GmelqBFMZEY7JwKXVE=)

Peter,

These days, it seems like everyone's talking about the influence of big donors in politics -- but here in Brooklyn, we're proving that you don't need deep pockets to have a stake in our race. This is a movement by everyday folks, for everyday folks, and we're relying on supporters like you to show just how successful grassroots organizing can be. **[So if you haven't joined our team yet, will you make it official by chipping in whatever you can today?](https://act.myngp.com/el/OestCTSbF-zy2xG3ohZ74qI2B3XYd648moZ4BwvxO4k=/k_Q3qvtRcryFgHi17FPL3qfcVgoHuxVCFTXbR8PsfBw=)**
******[JOIN OUR GRASSROOTS MOVEMENT](https://act.myngp.com/el/OestCTSbF-zy2xG3ohZ74qI2B3XYd648moZ4BwvxO4k=/k_Q3qvtRcryFgHi17FPL3qfcVgoHuxVCFTXbR8PsfBw=)******
Last quarter, we raised more in individual contributions than any other candidate in the race and surpassed our entire fundraising total from last cycle, all without taking a cent from corporate PACs. Rep. Clarke, on the other hand, lined her campaign coffers with over $138,000 in PAC donations from coal plant operators to pharmaceutical companies. But I'd take our people-power over their bottomless wallets any day -- **[let's show the Brooklyn machine just how far your small-dollar contributions can take us.](https://act.myngp.com/el/OestCTSbF-zy2xG3ohZ74qI2B3XYd648moZ4BwvxO4k=/k_Q3qvtRcryFgHi17FPL3qfcVgoHuxVCFTXbR8PsfBw=)**

There's a reason that politicians are still accepting money from corporate PACs: It's way easier to make promises to corporations in exchange for their money than to build a coalition of grassroots supporters. But that's not how we do things. **[So if you're ready for a change, will you help me keep on fighting for people, not PACs, by donating today?](https://act.myngp.com/el/OestCTSbF-zy2xG3ohZ74qI2B3XYd648moZ4BwvxO4k=/k_Q3qvtRcryFgHi17FPL3qfcVgoHuxVCFTXbR8PsfBw=)**

Best,
Adem

subject: We are one step closer to victory!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SINGH FOR SENATE
body:
We’re reclaiming America, one county at a time! | | | Dear Friend,

I have to share the good news:

**Last night, Ocean County officially endorsed my campaign!**

This means I’ll be on the ballot with President Trump in November. It means we are THAT much closer to getting rid of Cory Booker and putting an END to Phil Murphy’s anti-American policies!

**None of this would be possible without your support —**** _thank you_****.**

My team issued a press release this morning; I’ve included it below so you can be among the first to see it. We’re gonna reclaim America together, one county at a time!

—Hirsh
---
| | [ ](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=c8eb1d5122&e=3e017fab0f)
---
|
---
| March 5th, 2020
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
Contact: [press@hirshsingh.com](mailto:press@hirshsingh.com?subject=RE%3A%2011-09-19%20Press%20Release)
---
| |
# Hirsh Singh Wins Republican Stronghold in Ocean County

Ocean County, the most powerful Republican Organization in the state, endorsed Conservative US Senate candidate Hirsh Singh. Singh's victory made history as one of the first times in many decades that a candidate won the Ocean County screening off the floor, in a show of massive grassroots support and populist appeal. In Singh's victory speech, he stated that the results weren't close, and were a mandate that he will be the Republican nominee running against Cory Booker and with Ocean County's support, they will remove Cory Booker from politics. Singh will be on the ballot with President Trump in the highest Republican turnout county in the state.

Ocean County had delivered the most votes for Donald Trump in 2016, and is a powerhouse of conservative and Republican voters. Singh has become quite popular across the state with his consistent message for conservative principles and vocally pushing hard against Governor Phil Murphy's numerous failed policies like support for illegal immigration, drivers licenses for Illegals, attacks against the 2nd Amendment, and the affordability of living in NJ. This victory will give massive momentum to Singh's campaign.

Singh has been at the forefront of exposing Cory Booker's corruption and had worked extremely hard to flip many Democrat seats to Republican in November 2019. He is among the most popular Republicans in the state and the Senate seat would be in play should he win the nomination.

"I am grateful for the support of the people and promise to defend American and conservative values in the Senate," said Singh.
###
---
| For any inquiries, please reply to this message or send an email to: [press@hirshsingh.com](mailto:press@hirshsingh.com?subject=RE%3A%2011-09-19%20Press%20Release)

Additional information is available on our [official website](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=61b31966a3&e=3e017fab0f) and [Facebook](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=097f256140&e=3e017fab0f) page.

Thank you,
**The Singh for Senate Press Team**
_For the People_

name: =?utf-8?Q?Marc=20Flores?=
subject: The Work Goes On
body:
** Thank you.
------------------------------------------------------------

My friends -- my family,

For those who don't already know, we have officially come in second place in the race for Texas' 18th Congressional District. In the end, we received 4,948 votes, nearly 9% of the votes in our district. This may not seem like a lot, but in the lifetime of this campaign, we have done so much.

With your help, I have helped to build gardens, clean up neighborhoods, volunteer at food banks, and donate food, clothes, and supplies to those in need. Most importantly, my candidacy gave me the opportunity to meet all of you, and the people of District 18. I have grown immensely as a leader and as a person, and I have learned so much from all of you.

I decided to run for thus seat because of the experiences I had working on Beto O'Rourke's campaign. The people I met, the lessons I learned, gave me hope that we could do great things for our nation, that as a community we could do better for ourselves and for our neighbors. Looking back on every moment, on everything we have accomplished, I believe we have done just that.

As Ted Kennedy once famously said, although my campaign has come to an end, "the work goes on, the cause endures, the hope still lives, and the dream shall never die."

I congratulate Representative Sheila Jackson Lee on her victory, and I wish her all the best in the general election, and her next term.

I thank you all for your efforts and hard work over the last year. We could not have done what we did without your commitment, contributions, trust, and support.

>From the bottom of my heart, I thank you,

Marc

(P.S. I still have many, many block walks within me, so I'll see you out there!)

============================================================

name: Texas Battleground HQ
subject: MJ's built a campaign to WIN
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
But we can't get complacent now. Sen. Cornyn and his D.C. boss Mitch McConnell are terrified of the campaign we've built.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648902ac/7f51f7bc/4da62992/4ef182f5/1465302352/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648902ac/7f51f7bc/4da62992/4ef182f4/1465302352/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwMjMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-postprimary?refcode=email_20200305.1nd__1023__&amount=10&recurring=true")
---
Peter, it's official: MJ has placed first in the Texas primary. She'll be facing Royce West in the runoff.

For months, experts have reported that our campaign is in the strongest position to take on and defeat Sen. John Cornyn. **[Can you chip in to show them just how strong this campaign is?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648902ac/7f51f7bc/4da62992/4ef182f4/1465302352/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwMjMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-postprimary?refcode=email_20200305.1nd__1023__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

As a combat veteran and a working mom who's faced the same challenges Texas families deal with every day (and the first place winner in the Super Tuesday primary), **MJ 's also built a grassroots campaign that can marshal the resources needed to win the nation's largest battleground state** \-- all WITHOUT any money from corporate PACs!

Our grassroots team of **35,000 donors** and counting have pitched in an **average online donation of $23** each to help us get to this point. With your help, we've brought in more than TEN TIMES the individual donations of our closest competitor! **[Make your first* donation today to keep the momentum going>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648902ac/7f51f7bc/4da62992/4ef182f4/1465302352/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwMjMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-postprimary?refcode=email_20200305.1nd__1023__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

But we can't get complacent now. Sen. Cornyn and his D.C. boss Mitch McConnell are terrified of the campaign we've built, and it's possible **they might even meddle in our runoff** to boost our opponent! McConnell did it in North Carolina -- there's no reason he can't do it here.

name: Charles Booker
subject: Can I get your endorsement?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
The truth is that, while Mitch McConnell is deeply unpopular here in Kentucky, it’s not going to be easy to beat him. We need you on board.
#
I’m Charles Booker, and I’m running for U.S. Senate against Mitch McConnell.
[**Today I’m writing to ask if you’ll add your name to endorse my campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15750266/166527269/1000025376?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YWJhNzBmMi0wZDVmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SZ3wXRl_s_roLbvfkmRxlHOg1D2JsnKZ_tuTAL80GwU=&emci=29331e4d-0a5f-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&emdi=5aba70f2-0d5f-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&ceid=2635570) The truth is that while Mitch McConnell is deeply unpopular here in Kentucky, it’s not going to be easy to beat him. We need you on board.
Now let me tell you why I’m in this race.
**My inspiration for getting into public service was really out of survival.** Growing up in the poorest zip code in West Louisville, seeing my family struggle to make ends meet. It made me realize that if we want anything to change, we’re going to have to make a run for it. So I ran for State Senate.
**I ran because I had faith that things**** _could_****get better.** I saw my grandparents open up their home to foster care. I saw my neighbors fighting back on the picket line. And I saw my uncle become an advocate after my cousin’s murder.
**I am not the alternative to Mitch McConnell. WE are.** A single person cannot beat Mitch, only a movement can do that. If you’re with us, we need your help.
[**Please add your name to endorse our campaign for U.S. Senate right now. We need as many signatures as possible today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15750267/166527270/1000025376?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YWJhNzBmMi0wZDVmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SZ3wXRl_s_roLbvfkmRxlHOg1D2JsnKZ_tuTAL80GwU=&emci=29331e4d-0a5f-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&emdi=5aba70f2-0d5f-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&ceid=2635570)
**[Sign your name →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15750268/166527271/1000025376?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YWJhNzBmMi0wZDVmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SZ3wXRl_s_roLbvfkmRxlHOg1D2JsnKZ_tuTAL80GwU=&emci=29331e4d-0a5f-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&emdi=5aba70f2-0d5f-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&ceid=2635570)**
Kentuckians are stronger than the challenges we face.
But we need leaders who _care_ about us, who _see_ us, who _hear_ us. I’m running for all those people who’ve been shut out of the decision making process — the people who’ve had their voices drowned out by the wealthy and well connected.
Your endorsement today would mean a lot as we carry this campaign forward. [**Sign your name here if you want to add yours.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15750269/166527272/1000025376?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YWJhNzBmMi0wZDVmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SZ3wXRl_s_roLbvfkmRxlHOg1D2JsnKZ_tuTAL80GwU=&emci=29331e4d-0a5f-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&emdi=5aba70f2-0d5f-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&ceid=2635570)
Thank you,
Charles Booker

**[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15750270/166527273/440915040?refcode=em20200305-signup-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YWJhNzBmMi0wZDVmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SZ3wXRl_s_roLbvfkmRxlHOg1D2JsnKZ_tuTAL80GwU=)**

name: Tim Ryan
subject: Endorsed by the Human Rights Campaign!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
body:
I'm proud to fight for the civil rights of the LGBTQ community | | Team, For forty years, the Human Rights Campaign has been a leader in the fight for equality. As the largest national LGBTQ civil rights organization, they help us envision an America free from discrimination and hate, and their work helps make that vision a reality. **I am honored to receive their endorsement.** [](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9baf/5486deaa/3e35f830/dcb9666/2671679868/VEsH/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tim-ryan-2?refcode=200226_tr_HRC_graphic&recurring=1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=200226_tr_HRC&source=200226_tr_HRC") LGBTQ rights are civil rights, and I believe we must do everything in our power to fight institutionalized discrimination. That's why I was an **original cosponsor of the Equality Act,** which provides consistent and explicit protections for LGBTQ people across key areas of life, including housing, employment, credit, education, public spaces, federally funded programs, and jury services. I've also supported the Safe Schools Improvement Act and cosponsored the Tyler Clementi Higher Education Anti-Harassment Act, which fight discrimination and harrassment in our schools and universities. But the Trump administration has refused to support these crucial protections. Instead, they've embraced policies that discriminate against and endanger LGBTQ Americans. Now especially, we need strong advocates for civil rights at every level of government. **[Can I count on you to keep me in the fight this November?](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9baf/5486deaa/3e35f830/dcb9669/2671679868/VEsE/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tim-ryan-2?refcode=200226_tr_HRC&recurring=1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=2+-+Can+I+count+on+you+to+keep+me+in+the+fig&utm_campaign=200226_tr_HRC&source=200226_tr_HRC")** **[Contribute](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9baf/5486deaa/3e35f830/dcb9668/2671679868/VEsF/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tim-ryan-2?refcode=200226_tr_HRC_button&recurring=1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=3+-+Contribute&utm_campaign=200226_tr_HRC&source=200226_tr_HRC")** As long as I'm in Congress, I'll always continue to fight for the civil rights of the LGBTQ community. Proudly, \-- Tim

* * *
---
| |
#
Meet Tim Ryan
---
Tim Ryan is a champion for working families in Ohio's 13th District and is known for challenging both parties to do more to rebuild the middle class. Tim believes that every hardworking family deserves a good job, a quality education for their kids, affordable healthcare, and the security of knowing they can retire with dignity. Tim was elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in 2002 and has been fighting for working people ever since.
| | **Tim Ryan for Congress**
P.O. Box 189
Niles, Ohio 44446
---
[](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9baf/5486deaa/3e35f830/dcb966b/2671679868/VEsC/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "http://facebook.com/timryanforamerica?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=200226_tr_HRC&source=200226_tr_HRC") [](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9baf/5486deaa/3e35f830/dcb966a/2671679868/VEsD/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://twitter.com/TimRyan?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=200226_tr_HRC&source=200226_tr_HRC")
Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address by [clicking here](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9baf/5486deaa/3e35f830/dcb966d/2671679868/VEsA/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/s/update-your-information?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=6+-+clicking+here&utm_campaign=200226_tr_HRC&source=200226_tr_HRC") Tim is one of the GOP's top targets in 2020, and big-money attacks from Trump Republicans and right-wing special interests could come at any time. The only way we can make sure Tim remains in Congress to fight for working families is through the efforts of grassroots supporters, volunteers, and donors. That's why Tim needs your help. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with Tim's top supporters. However, if you'd prefer to [receive fewer emails](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9baf/5486deaa/3e35f830/dcb966c/2671679868/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.timryanforcongress.com/page/signup/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=7+-+receive+fewer+emails&utm_campaign=200226_tr_HRC&source=200226_tr_HRC"), please click the link. If you would like to be taken off the list entirely, you can also [unsubscribe.](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9baf/5486deaa/3e35f830/dcb966f/2671679868/VEsO/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://timryan.bsd.net/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=8+-+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=200226_tr_HRC&source=200226_tr_HRC") Usually no one reads this far, so good on you! From Tim and all of us at Team Ryan, thank you!

Team Lipinski

name: My Faith Votes
subject: New legislation that is just as dangerous as the Green New Deal
body:
| | Peter, Here are three important legislation updates we want to share with you. | 1. | Washington state is in the midst of a [critical battle over sex-ed curriculum that will affect grades K-12](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icYcIyRhB2URpXghNXmPGvOIDM4Vf0SDUUIZTpQMCKNvXbKSOdxNBaIUpcllP8Oia-g_436P9OGmt2Fa-UwVXVlW37ZvKaa6Rt4XvP-XzZuq&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200305com01&n=1). Already passed in the WA Senate, Senate Bill 5395 mandates the teaching of incomplete and inaccurate views that conflict with Christianity.
---|---
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icYcIyRhB2URpXghNXmPGvOIDM4Vf0SDUUIZTpQMCKNvXbKSOdxNBaIUpcllP8Oia-g_436P9OGmt2Fa-UwVXVlW37ZvKaa6Rt4XvP-XzZuq&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200305com01&n=2)
2. | [Congress has introduced the “New Way Forward Act”](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icYcIyRhB2URpXghNXmPGvPg9Y3lFhrfNzm2W_aHlPvNPb5AkvoTzyw0HmQT9ji9UcAlSw3KrdX3ViQJiV5fF6W0ptQtN56OmHGt7px3VLLV&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200305com01&n=3) that is just as dangerous if not more so than the Green New Deal, yet the media isn’t covering it. If passed, this policy would dismantle the rule of law as we know it in our nation.
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icYcIyRhB2URpXghNXmPGvPg9Y3lFhrfNzm2W_aHlPvNPb5AkvoTzyw0HmQT9ji9UcAlSw3KrdX3ViQJiV5fF6W0ptQtN56OmHGt7px3VLLV&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200305com01&n=4)
3. | And in Mississippi, [state legislators introduced legislation that would infringe on homeschoolers and private school freedom](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icYcIyRhB2URpXghNXmPGvPRR58gqUeiJ3b4VxN_WudwcSX5fClhwZjuA8CU_pKhaY70U44ewgibQSGGiE_1bLM&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200305com01&n=5). It’s a direct attack on parental rights.
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icYcIyRhB2URpXghNXmPGvPRR58gqUeiJ3b4VxN_WudwcSX5fClhwZjuA8CU_pKhaY70U44ewgibQSGGiE_1bLM&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200305com01&n=6)
We’ve provided these articles to help you better understand the ideological battles taking place on each of these issues and why they are critical to us as people of faith. We can’t lose sight of the fact that we are the first line of defense for biblical values.
In critical election years, such as this, we encourage you to _pray unceasingly_ for our nation and our elected officials, _think biblically_ about the issues working their way through legislation and to _vote consistently_ in every election to preserve our freedoms.
**United. We Stand.**
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200305com01&n=7)
* * *
You subscribed [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) to receive email updates from My Faith Votes. Our goal is to provide valuable content that equips you to prayerfully and thoughtfully take action in the public square. To update your subscription preferences or unsubscribe, click below.

[Update Subscription Preferences or Unsubscribe](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200305com01&n=8)

name: Sandy Smith
subject: Yuge Election Results News
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=giJ6ss0l7ZNxmng&b=kXfkcHKO3GwP2TIxJvNRNg)
---
Dear Peter,
I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district.

_I am a patriot! I was an original supporter of President Trump in 2015. _

Unlike the Republican establishment, I stuck with the President - through all of the media’s attempts to discredit him.

_I am proud of what President Trump has done! I am a true warrior for the President and his MAGA agenda. _

**If you are proud of our President, as I am,[I need YOUR help urgently](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=giJ6ss0l7ZNxmng&b=kXfkcHKO3GwP2TIxJvNRNg) to defeat my Democrat opponent and retake this swing seat!**

My support of the President was huge in __winning my primary with 77% of the vote!__ I won more than 30,000 votes in this district - _**we are on fire for the President and ready to flip this seat**_!

Consider what President Trump has accomplished, in three short years, despite the treachery of the Swamp and the Democrats:

**_-Record low unemployment.
-Record low Black and Hispanic unemployment.
-Record low female unemployment.
-Dozens of conservative judges, remaking our Federal judiciary.
-New, better trade agreements with Canada, Mexico, China, and other countries.
-Tax reforms and deregulation, paving the way for sustainable economic growth well into the future.
-Key terrorist leaders like al-Baghdadi and al-Soleimani killed!_**

**The fact is, with 65% of Americans better off today than four years ago, President Trump has done an amazing job.** And he WILL win re-election, no matter what the Swamp says!

[That’s why I’m running](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=giJ6ss0l7ZNxmng&b=kXfkcHKO3GwP2TIxJvNRNg). _President Trump has accomplished all of this with constant pushback from the Swamp. Imagine what he can do with a supportive Congress!_

First, the Never-Trumper Republican establishment- Mitt Romney and Paul Ryan, the “Surrender Caucus”- fought against the President’s attempts to get government out of our Health Care.

Then, Nancy Pelosi and the revenge-driven Democrats started pushing for open borders and higher taxes, a page right out of the Soviet Union!

_**Now, AOC and Bernie Sanders are trying to bring Cuba’s or Venezuela’s “corrupt Communism” to America. **_

I’m old enough to remember a time when Americans fought Communism, when Ronald Reagan won the Cold War over the Soviet Union, when America was the “Land of the Free”.

Now, the corrupt Republicans are mostly gone, and _the Democrats are flat-out embracing Marxism. _

_Can you believe this?!?_ I can’t! That’s why [I’m asking for your help](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=giJ6ss0l7ZNxmng&b=kXfkcHKO3GwP2TIxJvNRNg)!

That’s why it is so crucial that **we take advantage of every chance we have to flip a swing district** \- which North Carolina’s First District now is!

The Congressman whose district I was redrawn into, Democrat G.K. Butterfield, is a general in Nancy Pelosi’s Congressional Socialist army. He is one of her deputy whips.

As one of Pelosi’s enforcers, G.K. Butterfield has been responsible for some of the worst embarrassments of the do-nothing Democrat Congress over the last two years:

_-G. K. Butterfield just voted for the impeachment coup of arguably one of the greatest presidents our nation has elected. He voted for impeachment, not for any crime, but for political differences. _

_-He supports gun confiscation, socialized medicine, and abortion on demand up until birth. He actually voted for all of these!_

_-Butterfield voted for open borders. He doesn’t want a wall, and wants to let criminal illegal aliens stay here indefinitely- and let them vote!_

_-He wants ICE abolished and hates our brave law enforcement officers!_

_\- G.K. Butterfield votes nearly 100% of the time with Nancy Pelosi. I will vote nearly 0% of the time with Nancy Pelosi!_

**This is no future for America. This voting record does not merit re-election in a swing district. **

_I have a different vision for America_! I will always defend our Constitution, support President Trump, and fight for the values I hold dear - God, life, family, our rights and our liberties.

I owe it to our citizens to do what is best for the country. And that means running in North Carolina's 1st Congressional District against Democrat G. K. Butterfield.

G. K. Butterfield just voted for the impeachment coup of arguably one of the greatest presidents our nation has elected. _**He supports gun confiscation, socialism, abortion on demand up until birth, and open borders.**_

Why is Butterfield so extreme? _Before this year, he has never had a credible challenger!_

Before the court-ordered redistricting, North Carolina’s First District was a D+36 district. It contained Durham, among other Dem strongholds.

That means that no credible Republicans ever challenged him.

_It means that the local media never challenged him. _

He is comfortable, and doesn’t know HOW to fight. _**He never had to learn!**_

**But this year, this district turned into a D+2 district.** Half of the district has never been represented by Butterfield. They don’t know him- and they are Republicans!

These are my neighbors. They won’t accept a liberal extremist like Butterfield. They are excited to come out and vote for President Trump and for me- _because I will support the MAGA agenda in Congress!_

[Will you help me beat Butterfield](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=giJ6ss0l7ZNxmng&b=kXfkcHKO3GwP2TIxJvNRNg) and deprive Nancy Pelosi of a reliable vote?

The Dems have used the courts to cheat and choose their own voters to get rid of good Republicans the last few years. _They took advantage of their new opportunities- that’s how you take Congress. _

Here, we have a unique opportunity. A D+36 district got changed into a D+2 district overnight. That means it’s a swing district - and a good Republican with working class appeal can flip this district!

**You already know where I stand and that I will deliver on every important vote.... always! I won't waiver!**

_I will NEVER vote with Nancy Pelosi!_ She and her insane leftist agenda can go to Hell!

I am pro-America. Democrats like AOC and Butterfield are anti-America. We will defeat them together- but [only with your help](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=giJ6ss0l7ZNxmng&b=kXfkcHKO3GwP2TIxJvNRNg)!

Butterfield has half a million dollars of dirty Swamp money. But I have already raised $500,000 myself- and with your help, I will have the resources to beat him!
Pelosi takes her leftists wherever she can find them. It's time to fight back - together!

[Can you help me?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=giJ6ss0l7ZNxmng&b=kXfkcHKO3GwP2TIxJvNRNg)

I need your help urgently to make sure Butterfield doesn’t bury me early. __I need the resources to define him, inform voters- and win this crucial race!__

We only need 18 seats to retake Congress. **Can you picture what Congress would look like without Nancy Pelosi?**

Think about it:

_-No impeachment.
-No tax hikes.
-No socialized medicine.
-No stifling regulations.
-No gun confiscations.
-No infanticide. _

To me, THAT’S a future we can agree on! That’s keeping America great.

That’s a Congress that will produce for us, instead of embarrassing us.

We need to stop impeachment and any Congressman who voted for it. Let's save our country!

[Can you help me take this swing district back](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=giJ6ss0l7ZNxmng&b=kXfkcHKO3GwP2TIxJvNRNg), with your maximum contribution of $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1000, or even $2800 per individual, $5600 per couple?

**Can you show your support of our Constitution and our President, with the largest contribution you can make? Anything you can give is much appreciated!**

I know there’s a lot of needs. Because of Pelosi’s extremism, there’s a lot of seats we can flip.

But taking out one of Pelosi’s leading generals would be a major, crippling blow to the American Left.

Without Butterfield, Pelosi will be without a right hand.

We can strike a crucial blow to the Dems by [taking this seat back](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=giJ6ss0l7ZNxmng&b=kXfkcHKO3GwP2TIxJvNRNg). Pelosi will never recover- which is OK by me!

Your contribution will make a BIG difference here. Let’s go beat the Democrats together- [with YOUR help](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=giJ6ss0l7ZNxmng&b=kXfkcHKO3GwP2TIxJvNRNg)!

For God and Country,
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=giJ6ss0l7ZNxmng&b=kXfkcHKO3GwP2TIxJvNRNg)
---
Sandy Smith
Republican for Congress, North Carolina's new First District
Conservative
Entrepreneur & Military mom
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=giJ6ss0l7ZNxmng&b=kXfkcHKO3GwP2TIxJvNRNg)
---
P.S. Follow me on [Twitter](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=giJ6ss0l7ZNxmng&b=RFxW4ItjKu9l_S7SGFJewQ) and like my [Facebook Page](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=giJ6ss0l7ZNxmng&b=RfogT7wBV8GdZOALoq5Zsw). Also join my [Facebook group](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=giJ6ss0l7ZNxmng&b=pn2cCALRa1I5K5sL8KAJIg). To mail checks or correspondence, send to Sandy Smith for Congress, P.O. Box 434, Winterville, NC 28590.

PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC

P.O. Box 434
Winterville NC 28590
USA

[Unsubscribe](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?rMyMrEwcrLQcbIyMTGxMzLRGtCysHCyMTCzs) | [Change Subscriber Options](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?rMyMrEwcrLQcbIyMTGxMzLRGtCysHCyMTCzs)

name: Nikki Foster
subject: Chabot is putting us all in danger
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Foster for Ohio
body:
|
---
[ ](https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/m/7732ce5d/30a4f917/50b2b467/28cd75e5/295254557/VEsH/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fos_monthly_template?refcode=fos_header_logo&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A%09%09%09%09%09%09%09&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_EN_200305_ChabotHC_U2_X1&source=NKF_EM_EN_200305_ChabotHC_U2_X1")

| | **Steve Chabot has a shameful and outright dangerous record on health care.** He's given enthusiastic support for Trump's cuts to health care, voted more than 50 times to gut coverage for Americans, and has even voted to cut protections for those with preexisting conditions. **Votes like these put Americans in grave danger** \-- and as we're facing a global health crisis, this is a good reminder of why health care coverage is so important for every single American. Health care coverage helps keep us _all_ safe. [**Add your name if you think all representatives should pledge to never cut health care coverage for Americans:**](https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/m/7732ce5d/30a4f917/50b2b467/28cd75e4/295254557/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/s/NKF_EM_EN_200305_ChabotHC_U2_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=2+-+Add+your+name+if+you+think+all+represent&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_EN_200305_ChabotHC_U2_X1&source=NKF_EM_EN_200305_ChabotHC_U2_X1") | | | [Add your voice ->](https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/m/7732ce5d/30a4f917/50b2b467/28cd75e7/295254557/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/s/NKF_EM_EN_200305_ChabotHC_U2_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=3+-+Add+your+voice+rarr&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_EN_200305_ChabotHC_U2_X1&source=NKF_EM_EN_200305_ChabotHC_U2_X1")
---
When my son Henry made it out of the hospital happy and healthy after a horrible health scare, I spent a lot of time reflecting on what my family would have done if we didn't have good health insurance.
**We would have gone bankrupt.** And nobody should be spending some of the scariest and most traumatic days of their lives worrying about how they're going to pay their hospital bills.
My son has a preexisting condition -- and if Steve Chabot had it his way, insurance companies could discriminate against him and deny him coverage.
In Congress, I'll fight like hell to protect and expand health care coverage for Americans like my son. [**Add your name if you think all representatives should do the same ->**](https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/m/7732ce5d/30a4f917/50b2b467/28cd75e6/295254557/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/s/NKF_EM_EN_200305_ChabotHC_U2_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=4+-+Add+your+name+if+you+think+all+represent&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_EN_200305_ChabotHC_U2_X1&source=NKF_EM_EN_200305_ChabotHC_U2_X1")
| | [Sign on ->](https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/m/7732ce5d/30a4f917/50b2b467/28cd75f9/295254557/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/s/NKF_EM_EN_200305_ChabotHC_U2_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=5+-+Sign+on+rarr&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_EN_200305_ChabotHC_U2_X1&source=NKF_EM_EN_200305_ChabotHC_U2_X1")
---
Thank you,
Nikki Foster

name: Dr. Ralph Reed
subject: Join the largest Christian GOTV effort
body:
[ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eVNzUbm2GMmvbfVVOku5nc5aNYndT3FswcVSod27Q6zT0qytDXFTG95bPya2cwVbQqgtJr9tDYARhk-av2kSuiQj3GUHe3ZIcubmIlVk9eR-EYHOTJTI-6pUTU_RMBuk4ispW3qNsKFTYZadj2RYvSVsi_THh4iQYvMNRtu9p8PU6O1VHObrWOqmkeAbdaEqC7ycZSEiLCE=&c=AOks1WejX9WcsaBUL4a9kBVZoCsrJ085bcDyzNpkcBQ7mPI8HU5XzQ==&ch=tWRi1GUVqZOmmX2z3XcA6t_Hw4wifqs_-UwitWgWkxZPbxJ8glLl_Q==) Dear Friend, The 2020 election is upon us. **In 2016, Donald J. Trump won four states -- Florida, Pennsylvania, Michigan, and Wisconsin -- by a combined margin of __less than 200,000 votes__.** These states are _pivotal_ to restoring faith and freedom in 2020. Right now, Leftist organizations are aggressively pushing their progressive partners to recruit, pay, and train more than 1,000 workers across seven states, including the four mentioned above. _The 2020 election is the most important of our lifetimes, and will impact policy regarding life, marriage, religious liberty, immigration, and more. That is why we 've launched The 2020 Project -- the biggest Christian Get Out The Vote Effort in our nation._ **[Our ground game is essential and to win Florida, Pennsylvania, Wisconsin, and Michigan. We need your support of $25, $50, $100, or more today to launch The 2020 Project in earnest.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eVNzUbm2GMmvbfVVOku5nc5aNYndT3FswcVSod27Q6zT0qytDXFTG95bPya2cwVbQqgtJr9tDYARhk-av2kSuiQj3GUHe3ZIcubmIlVk9eR-EYHOTJTI-6pUTU_RMBuk4ispW3qNsKFTYZadj2RYvSVsi_THh4iQYvMNRtu9p8PU6O1VHObrWOqmkeAbdaEqC7ycZSEiLCE=&c=AOks1WejX9WcsaBUL4a9kBVZoCsrJ085bcDyzNpkcBQ7mPI8HU5XzQ==&ch=tWRi1GUVqZOmmX2z3XcA6t_Hw4wifqs_-UwitWgWkxZPbxJ8glLl_Q==)** [**Support the 2020 Project**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eVNzUbm2GMmvbfVVOku5nc5aNYndT3FswcVSod27Q6zT0qytDXFTG95bPya2cwVbQqgtJr9tDYARhk-av2kSuiQj3GUHe3ZIcubmIlVk9eR-EYHOTJTI-6pUTU_RMBuk4ispW3qNsKFTYZadj2RYvSVsi_THh4iQYvMNRtu9p8PU6O1VHObrWOqmkeAbdaEqC7ycZSEiLCE=&c=AOks1WejX9WcsaBUL4a9kBVZoCsrJ085bcDyzNpkcBQ7mPI8HU5XzQ==&ch=tWRi1GUVqZOmmX2z3XcA6t_Hw4wifqs_-UwitWgWkxZPbxJ8glLl_Q==) At Faith & Freedom Coalition, we are on the front lines of our nation's most important policy battles that will shape the direction and condition of our nation for generations to come. Our "Ground Game" is essential to continue defending our faith and freedoms. The 2020 Project has been identified as an integral part of the conservative plan and what it will take for our values in 2020. This project is focused on three core goals: * Voter Registration -- register 5 million new voters * Voter Turnout -- turn out 18 million voters to the polls * Voter Education -- mail more than 100 million pieces of voter education mail **[This will be the largest Christian Get Out the Vote (GOTV) effort in the nation, and I'm counting on your support today of $25 or more to help us ensure victory this year.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eVNzUbm2GMmvbfVVOku5nc5aNYndT3FswcVSod27Q6zT0qytDXFTG95bPya2cwVbQqgtJr9tDYARhk-av2kSuiQj3GUHe3ZIcubmIlVk9eR-EYHOTJTI-6pUTU_RMBuk4ispW3qNsKFTYZadj2RYvSVsi_THh4iQYvMNRtu9p8PU6O1VHObrWOqmkeAbdaEqC7ycZSEiLCE=&c=AOks1WejX9WcsaBUL4a9kBVZoCsrJ085bcDyzNpkcBQ7mPI8HU5XzQ==&ch=tWRi1GUVqZOmmX2z3XcA6t_Hw4wifqs_-UwitWgWkxZPbxJ8glLl_Q==)** **The future of our nation depends on Americans of faith like you and me, which is why we 've crafted this results-driven strategy to ensure victory in 2020.** The Faith & Freedom Coalition believes that the greatness of America lies not in the federal government but in the character of our people -- the simple virtues of faith, hard work, marriage, family, personal responsibility, and helping the least among us. Never before has it been more critical for us to speak out for these values. That is why the Faith & Freedom Coalition is committed to educating, equipping, and mobilizing people of faith and like-minded individuals to be effective citizens. Together we will influence public policy and enact legislation that strengthens families, promotes time-honored values, protects the dignity of life and marriage, lowers the tax burden on small business and families, and requires the government to tighten its belt and live within its means. **[As Christians, we must work to restore faith and freedom in America, which is why I'm inviting you to join me.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eVNzUbm2GMmvbfVVOku5nc5aNYndT3FswcVSod27Q6zT0qytDXFTG95bPya2cwVbQqgtJr9tDYARhk-av2kSuiQj3GUHe3ZIcubmIlVk9eR-EYHOTJTI-6pUTU_RMBuk4ispW3qNsKFTYZadj2RYvSVsi_THh4iQYvMNRtu9p8PU6O1VHObrWOqmkeAbdaEqC7ycZSEiLCE=&c=AOks1WejX9WcsaBUL4a9kBVZoCsrJ085bcDyzNpkcBQ7mPI8HU5XzQ==&ch=tWRi1GUVqZOmmX2z3XcA6t_Hw4wifqs_-UwitWgWkxZPbxJ8glLl_Q==)** Overall, we need to raise $42.7 million to win in 2020. If you are able to donate $50 today, it will allow us to knock on 28 doors, mail 250 postcards, send 300 text messages, make 125 phone calls, or show 2,500 online ads. This amount will translate into increasing our voter database, supporting field offices, and coordinating volunteers and staff. **If we 're going to disrupt the agenda of the radical Left and defend the values that have made our nation the greatest on earth, we need your support today.** **[Please help with your generous gift right away!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eVNzUbm2GMmvbfVVOku5nc5aNYndT3FswcVSod27Q6zT0qytDXFTG95bPya2cwVbQqgtJr9tDYARhk-av2kSuiQj3GUHe3ZIcubmIlVk9eR-EYHOTJTI-6pUTU_RMBuk4ispW3qNsKFTYZadj2RYvSVsi_THh4iQYvMNRtu9p8PU6O1VHObrWOqmkeAbdaEqC7ycZSEiLCE=&c=AOks1WejX9WcsaBUL4a9kBVZoCsrJ085bcDyzNpkcBQ7mPI8HU5XzQ==&ch=tWRi1GUVqZOmmX2z3XcA6t_Hw4wifqs_-UwitWgWkxZPbxJ8glLl_Q==)** [**Support the 2020 Project**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eVNzUbm2GMmvbfVVOku5nc5aNYndT3FswcVSod27Q6zT0qytDXFTG95bPya2cwVbQqgtJr9tDYARhk-av2kSuiQj3GUHe3ZIcubmIlVk9eR-EYHOTJTI-6pUTU_RMBuk4ispW3qNsKFTYZadj2RYvSVsi_THh4iQYvMNRtu9p8PU6O1VHObrWOqmkeAbdaEqC7ycZSEiLCE=&c=AOks1WejX9WcsaBUL4a9kBVZoCsrJ085bcDyzNpkcBQ7mPI8HU5XzQ==&ch=tWRi1GUVqZOmmX2z3XcA6t_Hw4wifqs_-UwitWgWkxZPbxJ8glLl_Q==) Thank you for your support, and God bless! Dr. Ralph Reed Founder and Chairman Faith & Freedom Coalition
---
| | Faith & Freedom Coalition | P.O. BOX 957736, Duluth, GA 30095-9529

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Kim Kardashian Returns to Oval Office to Back Trump Prison Releases
body:
"Kim Kardashian West returned on Wednesday to the Oval Office to support President Trump’s decision to release three women from prison." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3fcdf38996&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Kim Kardashian Returns to Oval Office to Back Trump Prison Releases**

“Kim Kardashian West returned on Wednesday to the Oval Office to support President Trump’s decision to release three women from prison,” Steven Nelson reports for the _New York Post_.

The President presented the women with signed copies of their clemency documents. Alice Marie Johnson, “whose life sentence was terminated after 21 years by Trump [in 2018], knew the three women while in prison and recommended their names to Trump.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bed619e482&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “First lady Melania Trump and Secretary of State Mike Pompeo honored recipients of the 2020 International Women of Courage Award at a State Department ceremony Wednesday,” Audrey Conklin reports. “As first lady of the United States, I'm proud of what this country continues to do for women,” Mrs. Trump said. Read more in [Fox Business](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3f22669747&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| At least 328 Chinese nationals trying to enter the United States illegally have been intercepted by U.S. Customs and Border Protection officials since January. The apprehensions come as part of heightened awareness at our borders to prevent further spread of the Coronavirus in America, Paul Bedard reports in the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=62044d303e&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Cutting red tape is tough. President Trump deserves praise for his latest effort, which should end the choke hold that the environmental movement has placed on economic growth and jobs. Ironically, the reforms proposed by Trump must now clear a unique hurdle: the additional red tape which surrounds every effort to change existing regulations,” Ernest Istook writes in the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a9af72700d&e=3ee4985eea "https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/opinion/thank-trump-for-cutting-the-red-tape-strangling-infrastructure-development").
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=080403b03d&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=32cd055ca0&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=751af2462b)
---
