name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Is that a threat, Chuck?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aWg55DUdMAxYM9sRtZX9cDt6OFr4HEq1xev4xVD7Jo8Ttz9OaCEkPSFB3zC-_TW7M9UD_x3e29MyDU1EDUMIdezmfmfNI5QV9ntgwlB6YSZKM4Vg0dctDTN-jNDseUGkSD1ZAaJP2UFD208ZWld3n_ucLFA0HtGsv4l18hT7AoY=&c=P14Rt0cDf46GJJRGBAT0nhEXNIXMMOpO7WnQNEuyBSYlRDDFKO-XwQ==&ch=FfSBmu76wDKUfWWOTiFCl4wdISGtiLZrE2lKfIsMuZt6-cAd2gx4Qg==)
---
| Patriot,
On Wednesday, Chuck Schumer openly threatened Justices Neil Gorsuch and Brett Kavanaugh at a rally just outside the Supreme Court of the United States. Not only was his rant unhinged, but it was also a direct threat against the Court and our democracy. Here is Schumer's direct quote:
"I want to tell you, Gorsuch. I want to tell you, Kavanaugh. You have released the whirlwind, and you will pay the price," Schumer told a cheering crowd of abortion-rights advocates in front of the Supreme Court... You won't know what hit you if you go forward with these awful decisions." \- Sen. Chuck Schumer
Chuck Schumer and the radical left have been actively trying to delegitimize the Supreme Court. First, they smeared Brett Kavanaugh in a shameful attempt to prevent him from becoming a Supreme Court Justice. Some have begun to call for court-packing so that they can add liberal activist justices to the bench. And now, they are actively threatening President Trump's nominees, trying to bully them into promoting radical liberal policies from the bench.
---
| | | [SIGN HERE TO STAND UP FOR GORSUCH AND KAVANAUGH](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aWg55DUdMAxYM9sRtZX9cDt6OFr4HEq1xev4xVD7Jo8Ttz9OaCEkPSFB3zC-_TW7M9UD_x3e29MyDU1EDUMIdezmfmfNI5QV9ntgwlB6YSZKM4Vg0dctDTN-jNDseUGkSD1ZAaJP2UFD208ZWld3n_ucLFA0HtGsv4l18hT7AoY=&c=P14Rt0cDf46GJJRGBAT0nhEXNIXMMOpO7WnQNEuyBSYlRDDFKO-XwQ==&ch=FfSBmu76wDKUfWWOTiFCl4wdISGtiLZrE2lKfIsMuZt6-cAd2gx4Qg==)
---
| We need to protect President Trump's Supreme Court nominees as they work to protect our Constitution and the values we hold dear. Trying to bully Justices Gorsuch and Kavanaugh and packing the courts to achieve political outcomes are direct threats against our Democracy and the Constitution. We must stand up against this behavior.
---
| | | [SIGN HERE TO PROTECT THE COURTS](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aWg55DUdMAxYM9sRtZX9cDt6OFr4HEq1xev4xVD7Jo8Ttz9OaCEkPSFB3zC-_TW7M9UD_x3e29MyDU1EDUMIdezmfmfNI5QV9ntgwlB6YSZKM4Vg0dctDTN-jNDseUGkSD1ZAaJP2UFD208ZWld3n_ucLFA0HtGsv4l18hT7AoY=&c=P14Rt0cDf46GJJRGBAT0nhEXNIXMMOpO7WnQNEuyBSYlRDDFKO-XwQ==&ch=FfSBmu76wDKUfWWOTiFCl4wdISGtiLZrE2lKfIsMuZt6-cAd2gx4Qg==)

| God bless America,

name: Margaret Good
subject: ACTION NEEDED: Support Democratic women up and down the ballot in 2020
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15758154/166603397/-940294256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmJkYjhjMS0yYzVmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-VkLjD5W16ogPBCOrh4WrG1U4oB0Yn04QFcUh77QpjY=&emci=29863d44-635e-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&emdi=9fbdb8c1-2c5f-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&ceid=9814644) Team, This year, we celebrate the 100th anniversary of the ratification of the 19th Amendment, which gave women the right to vote. This was a huge milestone in the fight for women’s equality and should be celebrated, even while we recognize there is still so much work still to do. name: Tina Smith
subject: Elizabeth Warren
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Folks — When this presidential election began, we had a record number of women running for the highest office in the land. Women who were brave, fearless, hard-working, and yes, persistent. Even though things didn’t go as planned, I’m so proud of my good friends and colleagues Kirsten Gillibrand, Kamala Harris, Amy Klobuchar, and Elizabeth Warren for getting in the ring and breaking barriers for young women everywhere. Look, I’ll be candid with you — today was a real kick in the gut. It’s hard to accept another election without a woman at the top of the ticket. We can be disappointed, but we must also square our shoulders and stiffen our backbones because our fight is not over. We may not see a woman become president this year, but we have some incredible women running for Senate. I’d love to tell you about two of them:
* **Theresa Greenfield is running for Senate in Iowa** because she’s lived the struggles that our families are facing. When her first husband died in a tragic workplace accident, she had one small son and another on the way. It was his union benefits and Social Security survivor benefits that kept her family out of poverty. We need a fighter like Theresa to stop Republicans from gutting our earned benefits.

* **Barbara Bollier is running for Senate in Kansas.** Barbara is a physician, not a politician. She’s focused on hard data and facts rather than talking points and partisan politics. Barbara will bring her expertise to the Senate, where she’ll fight to fix our health care system and lower prescription drug prices.

Democrats have a strong bench of women to take back the Senate from Mitch McConnell and the Republicans. We are electable, tough, principled, hard-working — and we’re going to win, but only with your help. **So, I’m asking: Will you split a donation between Theresa Greenfield, Barbara Bollier, and our campaign? Help some incredible women win their Senate races by chipping in any amount meaningful to you today.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Chip in $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15758426/166606401/-1636075923?refcode=em200305-midwest&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,1000&firstname=&lastname=&email=&addr1=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10&recurring=yes&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjYxNDRjZi0yZDVmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uqtUpTVuS7prn22XFhiGanmrtnn9zV9OhsJVDLSM730=)

clean_body: | Folks — When this presidential election began, we had a record number of women running for the highest office in the land. Women who were brave, fearless, hard-working, and yes, persistent. Even though things didn’t go as planned, I’m so proud of my good friends and colleagues Kirsten Gillibrand, Kamala Harris, Amy Klobuchar, and Elizabeth Warren for getting in the ring and breaking barriers for young women everywhere. Look, I’ll be candid with you — today was a real kick in the gut. It’s hard to accept another election without a woman at the top of the ticket. We can be disappointed, but we must also square our shoulders and stiffen our backbones because our fight is not over. We may not see a woman become president this year, but we have some incredible women running for Senate. I’d love to tell you about two of them: Theresa Greenfield is running for Senate in Iowa because she’s lived the struggles that our families are facing. When her first husband died in a tragic workplace accident, she had one small son and another on the way. It was his union benefits and Social Security survivor benefits that kept her family out of poverty. We need a fighter like Theresa to stop Republicans from gutting our earned benefits. Barbara Bollier is running for Senate in Kansas. Barbara is a physician, not a politician. She’s focused on hard data and facts rather than talking points and partisan politics. Barbara will bring her expertise to the Senate, where she’ll fight to fix our health care system and lower prescription drug prices. Democrats have a strong bench of women to take back the Senate from Mitch McConnell and the Republicans. We are electable, tough, principled, hard-working — and we’re going to win, but only with your help. So, I’m asking: Will you split a donation between Theresa Greenfield, Barbara Bollier, and our campaign? Help some incredible women win their Senate races by chipping in any amount meaningful to you today. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Elizabeth. Thank you, Amy. Thank you, Kamala. Thank you, Kirsten. And thank you, friend. — Tina Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

Here's why your contribution is so important at this critical point of our campaign:
* **Weather will be getting better, so it's time to start knocking doors - **We need to ensure we have resources to give every Kennedy supporter stickers and lawn signs. We need to provide every potential supporter literature that explains Joe's message. And we must make sure we are able to hire more organizing staff, ensuring we can reach every single voter in Massachusetts.
* **Attention is shifting to our race - **As we are sure you are aware, we just passed Super Tuesday, which included the Massachusetts Presidential Primary. Now that it's wrapped up, all eyes will be on this Senate race and we need to make sure we are prepared to win on all fronts.
* **The first quarter of the year ends in 26 days - **because of grassroots supporters like you, we raised more than our opponent last quarter. But in order to continue our show of momentum, we have to do it again. And do it big.

[**Now that you know the challenge ahead of us, will you pitch in $3.33 to ensure we have the resources necessary to succeed?**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390059/55b66746/2365af8f/80fc132/62468983/VEsF/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2020-03-04-three&recurring=1&amount=3.33")

-Team Kennedy

subject: We are so proud of this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Texas is winnable (and this incredible organization agrees)

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648902ae/7f51f7bc/4dbb22c1/4ef185ae/761762552/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | **_** Endorsement Alert: **_
EMILY'S LIST
Endorses MJ Hegar after first place finish in the Texas Primary

[Pitch in now to help elect a Texas tough working mom and combat veteran to the U.S. Senate >>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648902ae/7f51f7bc/4dbb22c1/4ef185ad/761762552/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwMjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-elendorsement?refcode=email_20200305.2nd__1025__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
---
This is huge, Peter! EMILY's List is all-in for MJ!

For 35 years, EMILY's List has championed strong, pro-choice women running for office who they believe have what it takes to win. They believe in MJ because she's shown all her life that she can take on -- and win -- tough fights, and that's why they're endorsing her in the election. **[Will you join EMILY's List in supporting MJ?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648902ae/7f51f7bc/4dbb22c1/4ef185ad/761762552/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwMjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-elendorsement?refcode=email_20200305.2nd__1025__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

When MJ's helicopter was shot down and she and her crew faced 150 Taliban fighters, she prevailed. When she took on the Pentagon to open ground combat roles to women, she prevailed. And when she fought for her life during childbirth, she prevailed.

It's going to take someone **tough** to win the biggest battleground state, but _The Washington Post_ has ranked this Senate seat as one of the ten most likely to flip -- and MJ has what it takes to do it. That's why EMILY's List is all-in.
**Will you pitch in to help elect combat veteran and working mom MJ Hegar, and defeat Mitch McConnell 's right-hand man, Sen. John Cornyn?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648902ae/7f51f7bc/4dbb22c1/4ef185ac/761762552/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwMjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-elendorsement?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200305.2nd__1025__&amount=5")**

**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648902ae/7f51f7bc/4dbb22c1/4ef185a2/761762552/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwMjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-elendorsement?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200305.2nd__1025__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648902ae/7f51f7bc/4dbb22c1/4ef185a1/761762552/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwMjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-elendorsement?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200305.2nd__1025__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648902ae/7f51f7bc/4dbb22c1/4ef185a0/761762552/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwMjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-elendorsement?refcode=email_20200305.2nd__1025__")**
The path to a new Senate -- one that defends reproductive rights, protects and expands our health care, tackles climate change, and finally passes immigration reform -- runs straight through Texas. **[If you're ready to send MJ to fight for us in that new Senate, donate today.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648902ae/7f51f7bc/4dbb22c1/4ef185ad/761762552/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwMjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-elendorsement?refcode=email_20200305.2nd__1025__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

body:
I’m sure you saw, but in case you didn’t – Congresswoman Elise Stefanik and her organization that supports Republican women running for congress has e Hey Peter, I’m sure you saw, but in case you didn’t – Congresswoman Elise Stefanik and her organization that supports Republican women running for congress has endorsed me.
I’m honored to have their vote of confidence from one of the GOP’s biggest stars.
Elise supported President Trump during the impeachment trials – standing up for the rule of law and against the Democrats’ **obstructionist** agenda – and now I am pleased to join her in this fight. Peter, to thank Elise for her endorsement and everything she has done for our country, we’re sending her a card, and we need your signature: The card goes out TOMORROW, so we need you to sign it ASAP. | | |
---
| | | Dear Supporter,

Please see my interview with Ed Morrissey from Townhall where we talk about the state of our race against Charlie Crist and the elections nationally from a Florida perspective.

“In FL-13, Amanda Makki hopes to send Charlie Crist into political oblivion. MakkI blends a fascinating life story with a love of America and a long resumé in national security and defense. Democrats “should be shocked at what their party has become,” Makki says, and says that The Squad on the other side is what motivates her. “I could be the counterpunch” to AOC and her colleagues, Makki says.

”This is a winnable district, and Makki is taking the correct approach in focusing on local issues in the district to drive a wedge into Crist’s support.”

name: Democratic Primary Update
subject: Can the Democratic nominee count on you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Governors Association
body:
| | |
---
The Democratic primary field is narrowing, Team. We have strong candidates running for president, but we're worried some people won't vote for the Democratic nominee if that person isn't their first-choice candidate.
We know the only way we'll defeat Trump is if Democrats show up to the polls in record numbers. **With so much at stake, we can 't afford to sit this election out. **
**If we 're going to take on Trump and the GOP, Democrats need to be united - so we need to hear from 3,000 Democratic voters before 11:59 p.m.: **
| | **Will you vote for the Democratic nominee?**

name: Marcy, Mark Warner Digital Director
subject: Introducing myself
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
I'm focused on making sure we hear from constituents.
|
---
| | Derek, it's great to meet you!

I'm Mark's digital director, and I'm so excited to be working with him for the people of Virginia.

Part of my job is making sure that we reach each of Mark's constituents where they are and provide opportunities to learn more about Mark's work, or to pitch in to help our campaign. In 2020, a lot of that outreach is being done online. On Tuesday, a record number of Virginians voted in the Democratic Presidential Primary -- and I want to make sure we're equipped to reach them all online.

That's why I'm asking for your help. **[Could you chip in $5 to support our digital program?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d5dc/53d9897e/53027b80/1c898858/1073126896/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ5OCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-marcy?refcode=20200305_f_1_nd__498__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

Your donation helps us create opportunities for Virginians to engage with Mark's campaign online -- paying for things like staff time to create graphics and emails, budget to push Facebook event invitations to a larger audience, and videos outlining Mark's work in the Commonwealth.

However you choose to engage, I'm focused on making sure we hear from constituents. Your input, enthusiasm, and support are what will help us build a strong campaign that reflects real Virginia values. **We have a long road ahead of us, and I 'm so grateful for Mark's support network. [I hope you'll consider helping us expand our digital campaign as we look toward November.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d5dc/53d9897e/53027b80/1c898847/1073126896/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ5OCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-marcy?refcode=20200305_f_1_nd__498__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")**

Talk again soon,
Marcy

| **[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d5dc/53d9897e/53027b80/1c898846/1073126896/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ5OCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-marcy?refcode=20200305_f_1_nd__498__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")**
---
|
---

1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani=20Brzozowski?=
subject: Pork Chops with #TeamDani!
body:
Come out to Walt's in LaSalle to eat some delicious pork chops and support Dani! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/aa1a2521ab68/pork-chops-with-teamdani?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
# Let's have dinner together.
I wanted to reach out and invite you to come out and eat some delicious pork chops from Walt's Tavern in LaSalle and help support my campaign to flip the 16th from red to blue!

**We will be dining at Walt's from 5-8 pm on March 30th. The address is 1059 9th St. LaSalle, IL.**

_Tickets are just $15 per person, or bring the family for only $50!_

You can purchase your tickets [here](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=5b697fe0c4&e=140a9b81e7)!

I look forward to seeing you there.

Dani Brzozowski

name: Unite the Country
subject: What you need to know after Super Tuesday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Unite the Country, [www
body:
#
_Peter, we 're counting on supporters like you to share important news about Joe Biden's candidacy. Super Tuesday was an amazing night for Joe Biden. Here are a few important things you can do right now to help us keep up the momentum. _
* * *
**Watch & Share**
#Joementum is real. Watch our recap and tell your friends to #UniteForBiden
[](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df76ed/287b9173/2b05f6d0/7e766b35/3419337510/VEsH/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "https://twitter.com/UniteCountryPAC/status/1235364993534746626?s=20")
**[WATCH ON TWITTER](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df76ed/287b9173/2b05f6d0/7e766b35/3419337510/VEsE/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "https://twitter.com/UniteCountryPAC/status/1235364993534746626?s=20")**
**[WATCH ON FACEBOOK](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df76ed/287b9173/2b05f6d0/7e766b36/3419337510/VEsF/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "https://www.facebook.com/UniteTheCountryPAC/videos/689114161832551/")**

**Spread the Word**
In Virginia, where Biden was declared the projected winner as soon as polls closed, turnout increased by nearly 70% over 2016. It's clear Joe Biden can generate the enthusiasm Democrats need to defeat Donald Trump and win back the Senate.
**[SHARE ON TWITTER](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df76ed/287b9173/2b05f6d0/7e766b37/3419337510/VEsC/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "https://twitter.com/intent/retweet?tweet_id=1235031518113742848")**

**Join us on Social Media**
Want more frequent updates on how to help Joe Biden on social media? [**Join our Slack group**](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df76ed/287b9173/2b05f6d0/7e766b30/3419337510/VEsD/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "https://join.slack.com/t/utcforjoebiden/shared_invite/enQtOTgwODkwMTc4ODY0LTY3ZTY5ODg5N2Q2MjIxYjEzYTA0NjI5NjMzM2VmMmFiMjMwOWQ3NGQ1MjFjNzVjMGVmZDQ4YjU4YjM1MTBiYTk") or [**DM us on Twitter**](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df76ed/287b9173/2b05f6d0/7e766b31/3419337510/VEsA/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "http://www.twitter.com/unitecountrypac") to be part of our community supporting and defending Joe on social media.

[](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df76ed/287b9173/2b05f6d0/7e766b32/3419337510/VEsB/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "https://facebook.com/unitethecountrypac") [](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df76ed/287b9173/2b05f6d0/7e766b33/3419337510/VEsO/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "https://twitter.com/unitecountrypac") [](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df76ed/287b9173/2b05f6d0/7e766b3c/3419337510/VEsP/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "https://www.instagram.com/unitethecountry/")
* * *
Paid for by Unite the Country, [www.unitethecountry.com](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df76ed/287b9173/2b05f6d0/7e766b3d/3419337510/VEsHBQ/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "http://www.unitethecountry.com"), and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Senator Jeff Merkley
subject: TODAY: I'm officially filing for re-election. Here's why:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2edf3/6cd27893/53d54096/15900895/2837293012/VEsH/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://www.jeffmerkley.com")
---

| | Today I am filing to run for re-election to the U.S. Senate because I believe so strongly in a vision of America that stands for opportunity and justice for everyone, no matter what we look like, where we come from, or which side of the railroad tracks we live on. That America is under threat, but I know that together we can take on the powerful and deliver for the people. [**Will you help me kick off this campaign by donating $3 or more to our "We the People" Fund? 100% of these donations will be dedicated to building our grassroots organizing efforts.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2edf3/6cd27893/53d54096/15900892/2837293012/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?refcode=2020-03-05-filing&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") The 2020 election marks a historical crossroads. Since 2016 we have seen the reality of a Trump Presidency and a McConnell Senate. They have packed the courts with unqualified conservative judges. They have extinguished Lady Liberty's torch and locked children in cages. They have fostered hate and bigotry, empowered polluters, taken away people's health care, cozied up to dictators abroad and shunned our allies. I believe that our nation is better than this, because I've been the beneficiary of America's possibility. After all, I grew up on stories of my grandmother living in a boxcar, yet I was able to go to college and be elected to the U.S. Senate. I still live in the same blue collar neighborhood I grew up in, and see how much tougher it is today for many of my neighbors. **I am running for re-election because I want to fully invest in a future where we stomp out corruption, invest in the building blocks for working families to succeed, and address climate chaos by building a green energy economy.** [**Will you stand with me to kick off this campaign with a roar of enthusiasm? I want to jump into this race by showing Mitch McConnell, Donald Trump, and their superpac backers that we're operating at full speed.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2edf3/6cd27893/53d54096/15900892/2837293012/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?refcode=2020-03-05-filing&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") Our vision of a nation that gives everyone a chance and joins together to invest in our shared future is being shredded by powerful special interests who have spent decades rigging both our economy and our democracy to amass wealth and power. We see the Supreme Court and Republicans in Congress and the administration single-mindedly twisting our institutions in their own favor. [**We need a grassroots movement to overcome their money and advantages, and that's why I'm so grateful for your support of our "We the People" Fund.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2edf3/6cd27893/53d54096/15900892/2837293012/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?refcode=2020-03-05-filing&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") With your help, I'm totally committed to winning my own re-election and throwing myself into my mission for 2020: _Ditch Mitch, Dump Trump, Save America!_ [**We face an awesome challenge and I need you with me. Chip in $3 right here.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2edf3/6cd27893/53d54096/15900892/2837293012/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?refcode=2020-03-05-filing&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") **Thank you** for investing in our grassroots organizing plan and this vision for our future by making a contribution to my campaign. Onward! _Jeff_ Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$5](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2edf3/6cd27893/53d54096/15900893/2837293012/VEsA/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZiMjVsZlgwPSI6IjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2020-03-05-filing&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$15](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2edf3/6cd27893/53d54096/15900890/2837293012/VEsB/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkSGR2ZlgwPSI6IjE1In0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2020-03-05-filing&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$25](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2edf3/6cd27893/53d54096/15900891/2837293012/VEsO/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkR2h5WldWOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2020-03-05-filing&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$50](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2edf3/6cd27893/53d54096/1590088e/2837293012/VEsP/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZabTkxY24xOSI6IjUwIn0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2020-03-05-filing&refcode2=express-buttons")
---|---|---|---

| | Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon.
---|---
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2edf3/6cd27893/53d54096/1590088f/2837293012/VEsHBQ/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "http://www.mandatemedia.com/")
This email was sent by **[Jeff Merkley for Oregon](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2edf3/6cd27893/53d54096/15900895/2837293012/VEsHBA/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://www.jeffmerkley.com")**
PO Box 14172, Portland, OR 97293.

Email is an important way for Senator Merkley to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com; click here to [update your email address](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2edf3/6cd27893/53d54096/1590088c/2837293012/VEsHBw/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://www.jeffmerkley.com/update-address/"). Too much email? [**Switch to our less email option here**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2edf3/6cd27893/53d54096/1590088d/2837293012/VEsHBg/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/s/less-email?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). If you no longer want to hear from Senator Merkley, [click here to get off all our lists instantly.](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2edf3/6cd27893/53d54096/1590088a/2837293012/VEsHAQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") Questions or concerns? [Contact us here.](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2edf3/6cd27893/53d54096/1590088b/2837293012/VEsHAA/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://www.jeffmerkley.com/contact/") |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Errol=20Webber=20For=20Congress?=
subject: We Did It! On To The General Election!
body:
Errol Webber has made it through the March 3rd Primary Election and Advances to the November 3rd General Election! | | | | [ ](https://webber2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe3c82000daee7a8e38e3b9c9&id=3fbbf047e5&e=a39a40cba9)
---
| | | **LOS ANGELES, IT'S TIME TO VOTE!** Peter Willis, Super Tuesday has come and gone, and I'm happy to say that we've made it through the California Primary Election and have advanced to the November 3rd General Election! To all those who shared my campaign content, donated your hard-earned money, volunteered on my campaign, and most-importantly, VOTED for me, THANK YOU!

We have our work cut out for us. Many Los Angeles County voters have historically voted Democrat-by-default, not recognizing how their vote has consistently hurt them. We need to run an effective voter education campaign to bring an educated and motivated electorate to the polls this November.

In the coming days, I'll be sharing developments about a new documentary I'm producing that will work in-tandem with my campaign's community engagement programming. I look forward to your continued support!
---
| [DONATE TO MY CAMPAIGN TODAY!](https://webber2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe3c82000daee7a8e38e3b9c9&id=3b604f075e&e=a39a40cba9 "DONATE TO MY CAMPAIGN TODAY!")

Join us in Los Angeles as we welcome and congratulate TEN THOUSAND newly-naturalized LEGAL American Citizens, and REGISTER THEM AS REPUBLICANS at the MAGA WELCOME PARTY and FLAG DROP! Let’s have a Grand Old Party!

Errol Webber, Republican Candidate for Congress in California’s 37th Congressional District, invites you to join him for a day of festivities, as we celebrate our President Donald Trump! Grab your American flags! Get your TRUMP banners and MAGA gear ready! Wear Red, White, & Blue!

We had such a great time getting new citizens excited about openly expressing their support for our President, Donald Trump, at the last Naturalization Ceremony in February, that at times, we had LINES of people waiting to take a picture with our cardboard cutout of President Trump! We did that with just a dozen volunteers! Let’s get A HUNDRED PATRIOTS to descend on the Los Angeles Convention Center and stand up for our President as we register new citizens to vote!
| [RSVP FOR MAGA WELCOME PARTY AND FLAG DROP](https://webber2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe3c82000daee7a8e38e3b9c9&id=f258d8156b&e=a39a40cba9 "RSVP FOR MAGA WELCOME PARTY AND FLAG DROP")

clean_body: Errol Webber has made it through the March 3rd Primary Election and Advances to the November 3rd General Election! | | | | | | | LOS ANGELES, IT'S TIME TO VOTE! Peter Willis, Super Tuesday has come and gone, and I'm happy to say that we've made it through the California Primary Election and have advanced to the November 3rd General Election! To all those who shared my campaign content, donated your hard-earned money, volunteered on my campaign, and most-importantly, VOTED for me, THANK YOU! We have our work cut out for us. Many Los Angeles County voters have historically voted Democrat-by-default, not recognizing how their vote has consistently hurt them. We need to run an effective voter education campaign to bring an educated and motivated electorate to the polls this November. In the coming days, I'll be sharing developments about a new documentary I'm producing that will work in-tandem with my campaign's community engagement programming. I look forward to your continued support! | "DONATE TO MY CAMPAIGN TODAY!" | | "LEARN MORE ABOUT ERROL" | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | Join us in Los Angeles as we welcome and congratulate TEN THOUSAND newly-naturalized LEGAL American Citizens, and REGISTER THEM AS REPUBLICANS at the MAGA WELCOME PARTY and FLAG DROP! Let’s have a Grand Old Party! Errol Webber, Republican Candidate for Congress in California’s 37th Congressional District, invites you to join him for a day of festivities, as we celebrate our President Donald Trump! Grab your American flags! Get your TRUMP banners and MAGA gear ready! Wear Red, White, & Blue! We had such a great time getting new citizens excited about openly expressing their support for our President, Donald Trump, at the last Naturalization Ceremony in February, that at times, we had LINES of people waiting to take a picture with our cardboard cutout of President Trump! We did that with just a dozen volunteers! Let’s get A HUNDRED PATRIOTS to descend on the Los Angeles Convention Center and stand up for our President as we register new citizens to vote! | "RSVP FOR MAGA WELCOME PARTY AND FLAG DROP" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2020 Errol Webber, All rights reserved.

body:

---
|
---
| | |
# Steve Watkins Will Help Me
Keep the Speaker's Gavel
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=62c9f92174&e=1050d051da)
---
| Dear Kansan,

Do you see that gavel I'm wielding? That's what has allowed us to impeach President Trump, even though the Senate Republicans acquitted him. _**I use it for political gain, and I need you to help me elect progressive Democrat Michelle De La Isla so I can keep it.**_

I wanted to make sure you saw [this article from a couple of months ago.](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=6a15053670&e=1050d051da) We have a strong Democratic candidate in Kansas' 2nd District, and we have _**officially added that seat back to our target list.**_

Why? Because the current incumbent is vulnerable. Here's the [direct quote](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=55e57690ef&e=1050d051da) from the DCCC, the group I use to get more Democrats elected.
_**“Congressman Steve Watkins has spent his first year in office distracted by scandals. With a weak Republican incumbent who barely won in 2018, Kansas’ second district presents an opportunity for Democrats to build on the historic gains we made last cycle.”**_

The thing is the scandals keep coming. Just today a [Republican oversight group out of DC asked the House Office of Congressional Ethics to investigate him. ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=4a540310dd&e=1050d051da)

_**There's only one thing that is keeping Democrats from picking up this seat, and that is Kansas State Treasurer Jake LaTurner.**_

If Treasurer LaTurner wins the primary, we'll have no shot of picking up this seat. And let me tell you, because of me forcing some vulnerable Democrats to vote for impeachment, we will lose some seats this November, so if we can’t win in Kansas 2nd District, I’m afraid I won’t get to keep this fancy gavel.

Bahahaha,
The Fake Nancy Pelosi

subject: Reception: Mary Eisenhower/Dave Lindstrom for U.S. Senate
body:
You are Invited | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/lindstromforsenate.com/reception-mary-eisenhowerdave-lindstrom-for-us-senate?e=41f8e27552)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

You are cordially invited to join your friends and **Special Guest of Honor, Mary Jean Eisenhower** , granddaughter of President Dwight D. Eisenhower on Thursday, March 26th for a special reception honoring Dave Lindstrom, Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate.

Also, attending the reception will be **former Kansas City Chiefs Tony Adams, Bobby Bell, Ed Budde and Bill Maas. **

Kindly RSVP to [pafeeney@dublingroup.com](mailto:pafeeney@dublingroup.com?subject=RSVP%20Eisenhower%20Reception%20) or call [816-223-4266](tel:816-223-4266). Please see below for additional information.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ian=20Todd?=
subject: Down Ballot
body:
The rest of us need you, too! | | | | [ ](https://IanToddforcongress.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0824156d3c3076099692cab73&id=35414d850d&e=c56804a14d)
---
| | |
#### Super Tuesday has Finally Come and Gone
# Now Let's Focus on Our Local Candidates
---
|
---
|
---
| To everyone that helped get out the vote for Super Tuesday, I thank you! It's been a crazy few weeks with the CD6 DFL Debate, Precinct Caucuses, and our Presidential Primary, but now that we have a chance to catch our collective breath, I can proudly say our campaign is more energized than ever. Now it's time to focus that energy and bring our attention and effort to the down-ballot neighborhood candidates.

Right now our State House and Senate candidates (and of course your U.S. Congressional Candidate, wink wink, nudge nudge) need your help. They've been rather overshadowed by the presidential race but are every bit as important. We will not see the positive change in our nation that we are after unless we elect passionate politicians to every level of government. We may not all agree on what candidate we want for the presidential race, but I know we're far more unified as we travel down the ballot to candidates we've met personally and want to see in office.

So please, volunteer your time. Give some [donations](https://IanToddforcongress.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0824156d3c3076099692cab73&id=4a6d4ae9ac&e=c56804a14d) to the candidates that aren't tossing around millions. And most importantly, let's stay united against hateful and bigoted policies and politicians. There is far more that unites us than divides us; sometimes we need to remind ourselves of that here in the Big Tent.
---
|
---
|
### By the way... Coronavirus is still a thing. Please stay safe!
As of 2 March, no cases of coronavirus have been found in Minnesota but we should still all take preventative steps to protect our neighbors, colleagues, friends, and loved ones.
* Avoid close contact with people who are sick.
* Avoid touching your eyes, nose, and mouth.
* Stay home when you are sick.
* Cover your cough or sneeze with a tissue, then throw the tissue in the trash.
* Clean and disinfect frequently touched objects and surfaces using a regular household cleaning spray or wipe.
* Follow CDC’s recommendations for using a facemask.
* CDC does not recommend that people who are well wear a facemask to protect themselves from respiratory diseases, including COVID-19.
* Facemasks should be used by people who show symptoms of COVID-19 to help prevent the spread of the disease to others. The use of facemasks is also crucial for health workers and people who are taking care of someone in close settings (at home or in a health care facility).
* Wash your hands often with soap and water for at least 20 seconds, especially after going to the bathroom; before eating; and after blowing your nose, coughing, or sneezing.
* If soap and water are not readily available, use an alcohol-based hand sanitizer with at least 60% alcohol. Always wash hands with soap and water if hands are visibly dirty.

For further information, please visit [https://www.cdc.gov/coronavirus/2019-ncov/about/index.html](https://IanToddforcongress.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0824156d3c3076099692cab73&id=3453eec1b7&e=c56804a14d). Also, remember we are in the midst of flu season, so let us be mindful of those who get sick without stigmatizing or spreading misleading information. May we stay healthy in building our movement!
---
|
---
| [Donate!](https://IanToddforcongress.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0824156d3c3076099692cab73&id=b56d8f0f5f&e=c56804a14d "Donate!")

# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15763713/166673913/1001356148?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjgyYzc0OC00ZTVmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ulYe03AJtfEs-Ty-X3JpSmJNKHtkUJSsZYY-PBiw0JU=&emci=e348c575-445f-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&emdi=8682c748-4e5f-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&ceid=8780864)
Friends \--

**I am thrilled to announce that we made it through the primary and are advancing to the General Election in November!**

I am so humbled and proud to have our support.

The time you spent volunteering, your vote, even the conversations you had with friends and neighbors about my campaign -- it’s why we were able to outperform all expectations and secure a slot in the General Election.

This is a true grassroots campaign, and it belongs to our entire community.

I look forward to what’s to come.

Yours in gratitude,

_Georgette_
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gomez-q1-2020?refcode=em-03052020-all-a)**

---
Paid for by Georgette Gomez for Congress
---
Georgette Gómez is the first LGBTQ Latina elected San Diego City Council President. Now, she's running for Congress to stand up to Trump’s dangerous agenda and recenter our focus on working families in our community. _**Georgette is the only candidate in the race for CA-53 to be endorsed by the California Democratic Party.**_ Email is the best way to stay up to date with Georgette's campaign. To support Georgette's campaign please [make a donation here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15763714/166673914/1136511447?refcode=em-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjgyYzc0OC00ZTVmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ulYe03AJtfEs-Ty-X3JpSmJNKHtkUJSsZYY-PBiw0JU=) We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/e348c575-445f-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd/8682c748-4e5f-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjgyYzc0OC00ZTVmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ulYe03AJtfEs-Ty-X3JpSmJNKHtkUJSsZYY-PBiw0JU=&id=110960909&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com).

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: A cold beer?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Hey there, folks. It's John Hickenlooper, again. The response to our March issues survey has been overwhelming, so I wanted to personally reach out to ask you one more time to submit your feedback before we close it tomorrow evening. [**Can you take a quick moment to tell me what issues matter most to you in this campaign? It would mean a lot to me if you did.**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771377/691c9bd/68f41a4c/11a77783/2121664438/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "http://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/march-issues-survey") | [TAKE OUR SURVEY](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771377/691c9bd/68f41a4c/11a77780/2121664438/VEsE/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/march-issues-survey")
---
Thanks,
-- John

* * *

Team --
This week, I'll be sitting down with my team to go over our priorities and strategy for the next couple months. Before we do, it's important to me that I get your feedback.
While my opponent is busy being Donald Trump's favorite yes-man, my top priority is making sure this campaign is about _you_ and fighting for _your_ interests in Washington.
**I wish I could sit down and grab coffee (or a cold beer) with each and every one of you to hear about your concerns. But the next-best way for me to know what 's on your mind is through my quick priorities survey.**
[**Will you take a few minutes (two, tops!) to let me know what issues matter most to you in this race?**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771377/691c9bd/68f41a4c/11a77780/2121664438/VEsF/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/march-issues-survey")
[TAKE OUR SURVEY](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771377/691c9bd/68f41a4c/11a77780/2121664438/VEsC/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/march-issues-survey")
---
Now more than ever, we must come together to build a winning movement to give Colorado a leader they can trust to do what's right. But the only way we'll win is if we set our priorities and follow through on them together.
Your feedback is extremely important to me, so I really hope you'll take some time to fill out my survey today.
Thanks. I'll be in touch soon.
-- John

Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
---
P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218
[Unsubscribe here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771377/691c9bd/68f41a4c/11a77781/2121664438/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

| | Friend, Today the Minnesota House DFL passed Paid Family and Medical Leave because all Minnesotans should have time to care for themselves or loved ones. Minnesotans are finding it harder to get ahead. Right now, far too many Minnesotans have to choose between work and taking care of a new baby, a loved one, or themselves. The time to act is now. We cannot let the Republican-controlled Minnesota Senate block progress. [**_Will you pitch in to our Rapid Response Fund today so that we can get the word out about this important legislation?_**](https://act.myngp.com/el/spHxnHxEHR6l0xdlcYeMv4Ea9NdcW8osVe-6YH9bIt8=/AA41w7s_kX6fyIZAvNSH8vOu1QDD4fHXhGAOHcO4j0o=?refcode=030520) _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ [**Chip in $25**](https://act.myngp.com/el/spHxnHxEHR6l0xdlcYeMv4Ea9NdcW8osVe-6YH9bIt8=/AA41w7s_kX6fyIZAvNSH8vOu1QDD4fHXhGAOHcO4j0o=?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=030520) [**Chip in $50**](https://act.myngp.com/el/spHxnHxEHR6l0xdlcYeMv4Ea9NdcW8osVe-6YH9bIt8=/AA41w7s_kX6fyIZAvNSH8vOu1QDD4fHXhGAOHcO4j0o=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=030520) [**Chip in $100**](https://act.myngp.com/el/spHxnHxEHR6l0xdlcYeMv4Ea9NdcW8osVe-6YH9bIt8=/AA41w7s_kX6fyIZAvNSH8vOu1QDD4fHXhGAOHcO4j0o=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=030520) [**Chip in $250**]( https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-mar2020?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=030520) [**Other Amount**](https://act.myngp.com/el/spHxnHxEHR6l0xdlcYeMv4Ea9NdcW8osVe-6YH9bIt8=/AA41w7s_kX6fyIZAvNSH8vOu1QDD4fHXhGAOHcO4j0o=?express_lane_other=true&refcode=030520) _You can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) and it will be refunded to you by the state through the Minnesota Political Contribution Refund Program._ While people at the top continue to do well, Minnesota's working families continue to feel squeezed. **House DFLers are fighting to ensure all Minnesota workers and their families have economic security.** Thank you for your support, **House DFL Team** [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/spHxnHxEHR6l0xdlcYeMv4Ea9NdcW8osVe-6YH9bIt8=/AG-Zxv5erIRNLLVZk0XT90kn8e6w-30kSNqzp86zgEg=?refcode=022720)

DFL House Caucus 255 E Plato Blvd Saint Paul MN 55107 United States = = = We are prohibited from taking PAC and lobbyist contributions during the legislative session. name: Team Ryan
subject: Re: Endorsed by the Human Rights Campaign!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
body:
Exciting news! Did you see Tim's email? | | Team, In case you missed it: our campaign was just endorsed by the Human Rights Campaign! The longstanding LGBTQ civil rights organization recognized Tim as a _"_ steadfast ally" who has "used his position of power to help improve the lives of LGBTQ people in Ohio and across the nation." Read Tim's message below, and **[click here to join the HRC in supporting our campaign.](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9bac/5486deaa/3e308dcd/dcb96cc/2359193275/VEsH/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tim-ryan-2?refcode=200226_tr_HRC_kicker&recurring=1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+click+here+to+join+the+HRC+in+supporting&utm_campaign=200226_tr_HRC_kicker&source=200226_tr_HRC_kicker")**
_\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Tim Ryan
Subject: Endorsed by the Human Rights Campaign!_ For forty years, the Human Rights Campaign has been a leader in the fight for equality. As the largest national LGBTQ civil rights organization, they help us envision an America free from discrimination and hate, and their work helps make that vision a reality. **I am honored to receive their endorsement.** [](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9bac/5486deaa/3e308dcd/dcb96cf/2359193275/VEsE/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tim-ryan-2?refcode=200226_tr_HRC_kicker_graphic&recurring=1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=200226_tr_HRC_kicker&source=200226_tr_HRC_kicker") LGBTQ rights are civil rights, and I believe we must do everything in our power to fight institutionalized discrimination. That's why I was an **original cosponsor of the Equality Act,** which provides consistent and explicit protections for LGBTQ people across key areas of life, including housing, employment, credit, education, public spaces, federally funded programs, and jury services. I've also supported the Safe Schools Improvement Act and cosponsored the Tyler Clementi Higher Education Anti-Harassment Act, which fight discrimination and harassment in our schools and universities. But the Trump administration has refused to support these crucial protections. Instead, they've embraced policies that discriminate against and endanger LGBTQ Americans. Now especially, we need strong advocates for civil rights at every level of government. **[Can I count on you to keep me in the fight this November?](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9bac/5486deaa/3e308dcd/dcb96ce/2359193275/VEsF/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tim-ryan-2?refcode=200226_tr_HRC_kicker&recurring=1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=3+-+Can+I+count+on+you+to+keep+me+in+the+fig&utm_campaign=200226_tr_HRC_kicker&source=200226_tr_HRC_kicker")** **[Contribute](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9bac/5486deaa/3e308dcd/dcb96f1/2359193275/VEsC/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tim-ryan-2?refcode=200226_tr_HRC_kicker_button&recurring=1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=4+-+Contribute&utm_campaign=200226_tr_HRC_kicker&source=200226_tr_HRC_kicker")** As long as I'm in Congress, I'll always continue to fight for the civil rights of the LGBTQ community. Proudly, \-- Tim

* * *
---
| |
#
Meet Tim Ryan
---
Tim Ryan is a champion for working families in Ohio's 13th District and is known for challenging both parties to do more to rebuild the middle class. Tim believes that every hardworking family deserves a good job, a quality education for their kids, affordable healthcare, and the security of knowing they can retire with dignity. Tim was elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in 2002 and has been fighting for working people ever since.
| | **Tim Ryan for Congress**
P.O. Box 189
Niles, Ohio 44446
---
[](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9bac/5486deaa/3e308dcd/dcb96f0/2359193275/VEsD/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "http://facebook.com/timryanforamerica?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=200226_tr_HRC_kicker&source=200226_tr_HRC_kicker") [](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9bac/5486deaa/3e308dcd/dcb96f3/2359193275/VEsA/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://twitter.com/TimRyan?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=6&utm_campaign=200226_tr_HRC_kicker&source=200226_tr_HRC_kicker")
Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address by [clicking here](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9bac/5486deaa/3e308dcd/dcb96f2/2359193275/VEsB/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/s/update-your-information?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=7+-+clicking+here&utm_campaign=200226_tr_HRC_kicker&source=200226_tr_HRC_kicker") Tim is one of the GOP's top targets in 2020, and big-money attacks from Trump Republicans and right-wing special interests could come at any time. The only way we can make sure Tim remains in Congress to fight for working families is through the efforts of grassroots supporters, volunteers, and donors. That's why Tim needs your help. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with Tim's top supporters. However, if you'd prefer to [receive fewer emails](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9bac/5486deaa/3e308dcd/dcb96f5/2359193275/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.timryanforcongress.com/page/signup/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=8+-+receive+fewer+emails&utm_campaign=200226_tr_HRC_kicker&source=200226_tr_HRC_kicker"), please click the link. If you would like to be taken off the list entirely, you can also [unsubscribe.](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9bac/5486deaa/3e308dcd/dcb96f4/2359193275/VEsP/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://timryan.bsd.net/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=9+-+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=200226_tr_HRC_kicker&source=200226_tr_HRC_kicker") Usually no one reads this far, so good on you! From Tim and all of us at Team Ryan, thank you!

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: WATCH: President Trump meets with Kim Kardashian West and grants clemency to 3 mothers
body:
President Trump has made reforming America’s criminal justice system a top priority. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ffac45cfcc&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • March 5, 2020
---
| | |
# **WATCH: President Trump meets with Kim Kardashian West and grants clemency to 3 mothers**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a5974ef474&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **President Trump** has made reforming America’s criminal justice system a top priority. In 2018, he signed the bipartisan First Step Act, which is leading to fairer sentencing guidelines and helping more former inmates transition into the labor force.

**Yesterday, the President** welcomed Kim Kardashian West and Alice Marie Johnson to the Oval Office. Johnson, a great-grandmother, served nearly 22 years in federal prison for a first-time criminal offense before President Trump commuted her sentence in 2018. She and Kardashian West joined President Trump yesterday as he presented signed clemency documents to three mothers: Judith Negron, Crystal Munoz, and Tynice Nichole Hall.

**Americans granted clemency** or pardons by President Trump are selected based on factors such as excessive sentencing and progress in rehabilitation. President Trump is committed to providing a second chance to _all_ Americans who pay their debt to society.

[MORE: President Trump believes the American Dream is for everyone!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f184a0b3ab&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **Coronavirus update: Vice President Pence in Minnesota and Washington state today**
---
| **The Trump Administration’s **whole-of-government response to the Coronavirus continues today as Vice President Mike Pence visited a Minnesota company leading in healthcare innovation before he holds a briefing with Gov. Jay Inslee of Washington.

🎬 [**WATCH LIVE at 8:05 p.m. ET: Vice President ****holds briefing**** with Gov. Inslee**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cb3c14ba6f&e=3ee4985eea "https://www.whitehouse.gov/live/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d")

**“I’ll be traveling** with many members of the task force to Minnesota,” the Vice President announced yesterday. “We’ll be visiting 3M, which is poised to literally begin manufacturing millions more masks for our healthcare workers.”

**In Washington state** , Vice President Pence and members of the White House Coronavirus Task Force are meeting with teams on the ground to make sure they are fully supported in their response to the outbreak.

**“Our hearts go out** to those that have been infected with the disease in the Seattle area,” Vice President Pence said. “Also we understand the anxiety this has created in the full community, and we’re going to be going out just to make sure—and sitting down with the Governor and with his team—that they have everything they need and all the support they need to see to the health of their people.”

**Thanks to early** and decisive action from President Trump—as well as the professionalism of federal, state, and local health officials across the United States—the risk to the average American of contracting the Coronavirus remains low.

[READ: Full text from yesterday’s daily White House Coronavirus briefing](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=db0f8a9c24&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **First Lady Melania Trump meets with workers on the progress of the White House Tennis Pavilion** | March 4, 2020
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e01ddc6417&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b2604f22d2&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=8c68515043)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Heidi?=
subject: What We Built
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HEIDI FOR CONGRESS
body:
I concluded my campaign for Congress this week. But this is just the beginning. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/heidifor25/what-we-built?e=c169cb0a8e)
---
| | | [ ](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=1977b82a2d&e=c169cb0a8e)
---
| | | ,
On Election Night, I ended my campaign and endorsed Julie Oliver in the Democratic primary for Texas 25. I’m writing to let you know that Julie has my support and my best wishes as she takes on Roger Dodger Williams, but I’m also writing because **I have an ask** that is more important than any other I’ve made in this campaign so far. When we started, we had zero dollars and nothing more than the endorsement of the mighty Austin DSA. **We grew this campaign** to 13 paid staff, 1,100 volunteers, and a hundred thousand doors knocked. We pushed the window on progressive policy in this Primary, we registered new voters all over this gerrymandered District, and we trained so many new organizers to be leaders in their communities. **What we built will outlast this election.** One representative can’t change a broken system alone, but the power of working class people uniting and getting into the fights that affect our lives? That’s the real maker of change, and I am unshakably proud of the movement-building work we did together on this campaign. At the end of my very first speech on the day we launched, I promised that win or lose I would continue to organize for the working class. I’m re-committing to that promise, and my ask for you is that you keep organizing with me. **The fights that brought you into this campaign are still going** , and whether you want to organize around criminal justice reform, Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, housing as a human right, or more power for workers - we need you if we’re going to win. For many of you, this was your first campaign, and I am overwhelmed with gratitude at everything you gave. But **I hope more than anything that this campaign will not be your last.** When we commit to building our movement, we commit to winning the better world we all deserve. **Tomorrow, I’m going to keep fighting for that better world** \- in our communities, rallying & protesting, at DSA meetings and City Hall and the Capitol. I hope to see you there, and if you could use a hand deciding how to stay in the fight let us know. . Solidarity forever, Heidi Sloan
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=ab60a29e70&e=c169cb0a8e)

name: Team Christy
subject: Can you make sure we hit this 24-hour goal?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| [](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b83d/29776869/acaa726/569f9bba/2820155904/VEsH/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://www.christyforcongress.org/")
---

| | Peter --

The results are in, and this is what we're looking at for our run-off:

**WHO:** Mike Garcia, who promises to be a puppet for President Trump. He has supported raising our taxes to fund giveaways to multinational corporations while refusing to pay his own, limiting access to reproductive care, and slashing Medicare benefits for seniors. He's now running around claiming Christy wants to "destroy America."

**WHEN:** The primary run-off is on May 12th, less than 10 weeks away.

In 2018, voters indicated that they're ready for a change, and that feeling hasn't gone away. That's why we need to make sure Christy has the resources to reach them and win this thing.

The national Republicans and their special interest backers are just itching for their first chance to flip a California Democratic seat in a decade. It's up to us to stop them.

**[We need to raise $20,000 online in the next 24 hours to get to a good place as we start our sprint to the run-off election.
